----- FILE START: tests/serving/pd-serving-simulator.test.ts -----
[Summary: PD-aware serving lab module: trace, token, simulator, context budget, or cache prompt logic.]
import assert from "node:assert/strict";
import test from "node:test";
import { PDServingSimulator, renderPDReport, type PDWorkloadRequest } from "../../src/agents/learningAssistant/serving/index.ts";

function workload(prefillTokens: number, decodeTokens: number): PDWorkloadRequest[] {
  return Array.from({ length: 12 }, (_, index) => ({
    id: `r-${index}`,
    arrivalMs: index * 250,
    prefillTokens,
    decodeTokens,
    cacheablePrefixTokens: Math.floor(prefillTokens * 0.5),
    priority: "interactive"
  }));
}

test("policy comparison preserves request count", () => {
  const simulator = new PDServingSimulator();
  const results = simulator.comparePolicies(workload(1000, 80), { slo: { ttftMs: 800, tpotMs: 80, e2eMs: 8000 } });
  assert.equal(results.length, 3);
  for (const result of results) assert.equal(result.requestCount, 12);
});

test("increasing prefill tokens increases TTFT", () => {
  const simulator = new PDServingSimulator();
  const low = simulator.simulatePDDisaggregated(workload(400, 80)).latency.ttftP90;
  const high = simulator.simulatePDDisaggregated(workload(2400, 80)).latency.ttftP90;
  assert.ok(high > low);
});

test("increasing decode tokens increases TPOT or E2E", () => {
  const simulator = new PDServingSimulator();
  const low = simulator.simulatePDDisaggregated(workload(800, 40)).latency;
  const high = simulator.simulatePDDisaggregated(workload(800, 240)).latency;
  assert.ok(high.tpotP90 >= low.tpotP90);
  assert.ok(high.e2eP90 > low.e2eP90);
});

test("pd_disaggregated improves decode-heavy TPOT tail against monolithic", () => {
  const simulator = new PDServingSimulator();
  const requests = workload(600, 320);
  const mono = simulator.simulateMonolithic(requests);
  const pd = simulator.simulatePDDisaggregated(requests);
  assert.ok(pd.latency.tpotP90 < mono.latency.tpotP90 || pd.goodput >= mono.goodput);
});

test("hybrid goodput is not below the worse baseline on balanced SLO", () => {
  const simulator = new PDServingSimulator();
  const requests = simulator.buildSyntheticWorkload(40, 4);
  const [mono, pd, hybrid] = simulator.comparePolicies(requests, { slo: { ttftMs: 900, tpotMs: 90, e2eMs: 10000 } });
  assert.ok(hybrid.goodput >= Math.min(mono.goodput, pd.goodput));
});

test("PD simulation report labels goodput as estimated and simulated", () => {
  const simulator = new PDServingSimulator();
  const report = renderPDReport(simulator.comparePolicies(simulator.buildSyntheticWorkload(8, 2)));
  assert.match(report, /Measurement mode: simulated/);
  assert.match(report, /estimatedGoodputUnderSLO/);
  assert.match(report, /not real GPU/i);
});

----- FILE END: tests/serving/pd-serving-simulator.test.ts -----

----- FILE START: tests/serving/token-estimator.test.ts -----
[Summary: PD-aware serving lab module: trace, token, simulator, context budget, or cache prompt logic.]
import assert from "node:assert/strict";
import test from "node:test";
import { TokenEstimator } from "../../src/agents/learningAssistant/serving/index.ts";

test("token estimator is deterministic for Chinese, English, and mixed text", () => {
  const estimator = new TokenEstimator();
  const samples = ["人工智能三要素：数据、算法、算力", "Prefill decode separation improves serving efficiency.", "mAP50 和 F1 are detection metrics."];
  for (const sample of samples) {
    const first = estimator.estimateTokens(sample);
    const second = estimator.estimateTokens(sample);
    assert.ok(first > 0);
    assert.equal(first, second);
  }
});

test("longer text estimates more tokens", () => {
  const estimator = new TokenEstimator();
  const short = estimator.estimateTokens("数据决定模型知识边界。");
  const long = estimator.estimateTokens("数据决定模型知识边界。数据规模、质量和覆盖范围都会影响训练后的泛化能力。");
  assert.ok(long > short);
});

----- FILE END: tests/serving/token-estimator.test.ts -----

----- FILE START: tests/serving/trace-store.test.ts -----
[Summary: PD-aware serving lab module: trace, token, simulator, context budget, or cache prompt logic.]
import assert from "node:assert/strict";
import { promises as fs } from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";
import test from "node:test";
import { RequestTraceStore, type ServingPhaseTrace } from "../../src/agents/learningAssistant/serving/index.ts";

function trace(id: string): ServingPhaseTrace {
  return {
    requestId: id,
    createdAt: new Date(0).toISOString(),
    queryHash: `hash-${id}`,
    answerGenerationMode: "template_fallback",
    tokenEstimate: {
      systemTokens: 1,
      userPromptTokens: 2,
      currentPageTokens: 3,
      teacherScriptTokens: 0,
      outlineTokens: 0,
      neighborPageTokens: 0,
      knowledgeBaseTokens: 0,
      selectedEvidenceTokens: 3,
      estimatedPrefillTokens: 3,
      estimatedDecodeTokens: 4,
      cacheablePrefixTokens: 1,
      nonCacheableTokens: 2
    },
    latencyMs: { total: 10 },
    selectedEvidenceCount: 1,
    rejectedEvidenceCount: 0,
    confidence: 0.6
  };
}

test("ring buffer limit is enforced", async () => {
  const store = new RequestTraceStore({ limit: 2, enabledJsonl: false });
  await store.add(trace("1"));
  await store.add(trace("2"));
  await store.add(trace("3"));
  assert.deepEqual(store.list({ limit: 10 }).map((item) => item.requestId), ["3", "2"]);
});

test("JSONL trace does not contain raw API key, raw prompt, or raw answer", async () => {
  const tracePath = path.join("tests", "serving-output", `trace-${Date.now()}.jsonl`);
  const store = new RequestTraceStore({ limit: 5, tracePath, enabledJsonl: true });
  await store.add(trace("safe"));
  const text = await fs.readFile(tracePath, "utf8");
  assert.equal(text.includes("[REDACTED_SK_PATTERN]"), false);
  assert.equal(text.includes("rawPrompt"), false);
  assert.equal(text.includes("rawAnswer"), false);
});

----- FILE END: tests/serving/trace-store.test.ts -----

----- FILE START: tests/TEST-2009/assertions.ts -----
[Summary: Project source or test file.]
import path from "node:path";
import type {
  AssertionResult,
  Confidence,
  RetrievalExpectation,
  SourceType,
  Test2009CaseResult,
  Test2009EvaluationResults
} from "./TEST-2009.output-types.ts";

export function runCaseAssertions(result: Test2009CaseResult, outputDir: string, secrets: string[] = []): AssertionResult[] {
  return [
    assertAnswerabilityMatchesExpected(result),
    assertRetrievalBehavior(result),
    assertConfidenceDistribution(result),
    assertMustMention(result),
    assertMustMentionAny(result),
    assertMustNotMention(result),
    assertNoInventedNumbers(result),
    assertCitationsMatchSources(result),
    assertEvidenceSnippetPresent(result),
    assertCurrentPagePreviewPresent(result),
    assertNoApiKeyLeak(result, secrets),
    assertNoOverclaim(result),
    assertStyleBehavior(result),
    assertAmbiguousMetricClarification(result),
    assertGeneralKnowledgeLabeled(result),
    assertPlatformContextUsed(result),
    assertOutputDirIsTest2009(outputDir)
  ];
}

export function runSuiteAssertions(results: Test2009EvaluationResults, outputDir: string): AssertionResult[] {
  const confidences = new Set(results.results.map((item) => item.confidence));
  const retrievalStatuses = new Set(results.results.map((item) => item.retrieval.status));
  const filesInside = results.results.every((item) => {
    const paths = [item.material.previewImagePath, ...item.citations.map((citation) => citation.previewImageUrl)].filter(Boolean) as string[];
    return paths.every((itemPath) => isInside(outputDir, path.resolve(outputDir, itemPath)));
  });
  return [
    {
      name: "suite has at least 34 cases",
      passed: results.results.length >= 34,
      expected: ">=34",
      actual: results.results.length
    },
    {
      name: "suite uses at least 4 decks",
      passed: results.summary.deckCount >= 4,
      expected: ">=4",
      actual: results.summary.deckCount
    },
    {
      name: "suite has confidence spread",
      passed: confidences.has("low") && confidences.has("medium") && confidences.has("high"),
      expected: "low, medium, high",
      actual: [...confidences].join(", ")
    },
    {
      name: "suite has retrieval status coverage",
      passed: retrievalStatuses.has("success") && (retrievalStatuses.has("skipped") || retrievalStatuses.has("empty")),
      expected: "success and skipped/empty",
      actual: [...retrievalStatuses].join(", ")
    },
    {
      name: "suite output paths stay inside TEST-2009",
      passed: filesInside && assertOutputDirIsTest2009(outputDir).passed,
      expected: outputDir,
      actual: filesInside ? "inside" : "outside path found"
    }
  ];
}

export function assertAnswerabilityMatchesExpected(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const expected = result.case.expectedAnswerability;
  const actual = result.answerability;
  const passed =
    expected === actual ||
    (expected === "answerable_from_context" &&
      ["answerable_from_context", "answerable_from_current_page_plus_general_knowledge"].includes(actual)) ||
    (expected === "answerable_from_retrieval" &&
      result.retrieval.status === "success" &&
      result.citations.some((citation) => ["knowledge_base", "wiki"].includes(citation.sourceType))) ||
    (expected === "partially_answerable_from_context" && ["answerable_from_context", "needs_clarification_or_partial"].includes(actual)) ||
    (expected === "answerable_from_current_page_plus_general_knowledge" &&
      ["answerable_from_current_page", "answerable_from_general_knowledge_with_label", "answerable_from_context"].includes(actual)) ||
    (expected === "needs_clarification_or_partial" && ["needs_clarification_or_partial", "partially_answerable_from_context"].includes(actual));

  if (expected === "not_answerable") {
    const refusalOk =
      result.confidence === "low" &&
      result.answerability === "not_answerable" &&
      result.citations.filter((citation) => citation.sourceType !== "none").length === 0;
    return {
      name: "answerability matches not_answerable guardrail",
      passed: refusalOk,
      expected: "not_answerable + low confidence + no supporting citations",
      actual: `${actual} / ${result.confidence} / citations=${result.citations.length}`,
      reason: refusalOk ? undefined : "unsupported exact/budget questions must refuse instead of leaning on current page"
    };
  }

  return {
    name: "answerability matches expected",
    passed,
    expected,
    actual
  };
}

export function assertRetrievalBehavior(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const expected = result.case.expectedRetrieval;
  const actual = result.retrieval.status;
  const called = result.retrieval.called;
  if ((expected === "skipped" || expected === "skipped_or_optional") && called && actual === "empty") {
    return {
      name: "retrieval behavior",
      passed: true,
      expected,
      actual: `${called ? "called" : "not called"}:${actual}`,
      reason: "retrieval was unnecessary and empty; recorded as retrieval policy warning rather than answer failure"
    };
  }
  const passed = retrievalMatches(expected, called, actual);
  return {
    name: "retrieval behavior",
    passed,
    expected,
    actual: `${called ? "called" : "not called"}:${actual}`,
    reason: passed ? undefined : result.retrieval.reason
  };
}

export function assertConfidenceDistribution(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const expected = result.case.expectedConfidence;
  const actual = result.confidence;
  const passed =
    expected === actual ||
    (expected === "low_or_medium" && ["low", "medium"].includes(actual)) ||
    (expected === "medium_or_high" && ["medium", "high"].includes(actual));
  return { name: "confidence expectation", passed, expected, actual };
}

export function assertMustMention(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const terms = result.case.mustMention ?? [];
  if (terms.length === 0) return pass("must mention terms", "not configured");
  const missing = terms.filter((term) => !contains(result.answer, term) && !numericMentionEquivalent(result.answer, term));
  return {
    name: "must mention terms",
    passed: missing.length === 0,
    expected: terms,
    actual: missing.length ? `missing: ${missing.join(", ")}` : "all present"
  };
}

export function assertMustMentionAny(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const terms = result.case.mustMentionAny ?? [];
  if (terms.length === 0) return pass("must mention any", "not configured");
  const passed = terms.some((term) => contains(result.answer, term) || numericMentionEquivalent(result.answer, term));
  return {
    name: "must mention any",
    passed,
    expected: terms,
    actual: passed ? "matched" : "none matched"
  };
}

export function assertMustNotMention(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const terms = [...(result.case.mustNotMention ?? []), ...(result.case.mustNotSay ?? [])];
  if (terms.length === 0) return pass("must not mention terms", "not configured");
  const found = terms.filter((term) => contains(result.answer, term));
  return {
    name: "must not mention terms",
    passed: found.length === 0,
    expected: `avoid ${terms.join(", ")}`,
    actual: found.length ? `found: ${found.join(", ")}` : "clean"
  };
}

export function assertNoInventedNumbers(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  if (!result.case.mustNotInventNumbers) return pass("no invented numbers", "not configured");

  if (result.case.expectedAnswerability === "not_answerable") {
    const questionNumbers = new Set(extractNumbers(result.question));
    const answerNumbers = extractNumbers(result.answer);
    const newNumbers = answerNumbers.filter((num) => !questionNumbers.has(num));
    const suspiciousFormula = /(?:=|\+|\/|\*)\s*\d/.test(result.answer);
    const suspiciousCost = newNumbers.some((num) => new RegExp(`${escapeRegExp(num)}\\s*(元|美元|万元|亿|%|kg|m3|kWh)`, "i").test(result.answer));
    const suspicious = suspiciousFormula || suspiciousCost;
    return {
      name: "no invented numbers",
      passed: !suspicious,
      expected: "no new formulas, costs, or unsupported numbers in refusal",
      actual: suspicious ? `suspicious new number/formula found; newNumbers=${newNumbers.join(",")}` : "clean"
    };
  }

  const allowedText = [
    result.question,
    ...Object.values(result.case.numericExpected ?? {}).map(String),
    ...result.selectedEvidence.map((item) => `${item.textPreview} ${item.evidenceSnippet ?? ""}`),
    ...result.citations.map((item) => `${item.textPreview ?? ""} ${item.evidenceSnippet ?? ""}`)
  ].join("\n");
  const answerNumbers = extractNumbers(result.answer);
  const unsupported = answerNumbers.filter((num) => !isBenignReferenceNumber(result.answer, num) && !containsLooseNumber(allowedText, num));
  return {
    name: "no invented numbers",
    passed: unsupported.length === 0,
    expected: "answer numbers appear in evidence or numeric expectation",
    actual: unsupported.length ? `unsupported: ${unsupported.join(", ")}` : "clean"
  };
}

export function assertCitationsMatchSources(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const requirements = result.case.citationRequirements ?? [];
  if (requirements.length === 0) return pass("citations match sources", "not configured");
  const sources = new Set(result.citations.map((citation) => normalizeSource(citation.sourceType)));
  const missing = requirements.filter((source) => !sourceSatisfied(source, sources));
  return {
    name: "citations match sources",
    passed: missing.length === 0,
    expected: requirements,
    actual: [...sources].join(", ") || "none"
  };
}

export function assertEvidenceSnippetPresent(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const citationsNeedingSnippet = result.citations.filter((citation) => citation.sourceType !== "none");
  const missing = citationsNeedingSnippet.filter((citation) => !citation.evidenceSnippet && !citation.textPreview);
  return {
    name: "evidence snippet present",
    passed: missing.length === 0,
    expected: "every citation has evidenceSnippet or textPreview",
    actual: missing.length ? `${missing.length} missing` : "all present"
  };
}

export function assertCurrentPagePreviewPresent(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const hasPreview =
    result.material.previewStatus === "ready" &&
    Boolean(result.material.previewImagePath || result.material.previewImageUrl);
  return {
    name: "current page preview present",
    passed: hasPreview,
    expected: "ready preview image",
    actual: `${result.material.previewStatus}:${result.material.previewImageUrl ?? result.material.previewImagePath ?? "none"}`,
    reason: hasPreview ? undefined : result.material.previewError
  };
}

export function assertNoApiKeyLeak(result: Test2009CaseResult, secrets: string[] = []): AssertionResult {
  const serialized = JSON.stringify(result);
  const leakedSecret = secrets.filter(Boolean).find((secret) => serialized.includes(secret));
  const leakedKeyPattern = /sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}/.test(serialized);
  return {
    name: "no API key leak",
    passed: !leakedSecret && !leakedKeyPattern,
    expected: "no raw key or sk-* token",
    actual: leakedSecret ? "exact key leaked" : leakedKeyPattern ? "sk-* token found" : "clean"
  };
}

export function assertNoOverclaim(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  if (!result.case.mustNotOverclaim && !(result.case.mustNotAssert?.length)) return pass("no overclaim", "not configured");
  const forbidden = [
    ...(result.case.mustNotAssert ?? []),
    "彻底消除",
    "所有方法中全局最优",
    "所有数据集",
    "一定越好"
  ];
  const found = forbidden.filter((term) => contains(result.answer, term) && !isNegatedOverclaim(result.answer, term));
  return {
    name: "no overclaim",
    passed: found.length === 0,
    expected: `avoid overclaims`,
    actual: found.length ? found.join(", ") : "clean"
  };
}

export function assertStyleBehavior(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const expectations = new Set(result.case.styleAssertions ?? []);
  if (expectations.size === 0) return pass("style behavior", "not configured");
  const failures: string[] = [];
  if (expectations.has("socratic") && !/[？?]/.test(result.answer)) failures.push("socratic answer should include guiding questions");
  if (expectations.has("concise") && countSentences(result.answer) > 3) failures.push("concise answer should be within 3 sentences");
  if (expectations.has("analogy") && !/(类比|像|好比|可以把|类似|想象|比作)/.test(result.answer)) failures.push("analogy answer should use an analogy cue");
  if (expectations.has("beginner_friendly") && result.answer.length > 1200) failures.push("beginner-friendly answer is too long");
  if (expectations.has("deep_dive") && result.answer.length < 240) failures.push("deep-dive answer is too short");
  return {
    name: "style behavior",
    passed: failures.length === 0,
    expected: [...expectations],
    actual: failures.length ? failures.join("; ") : "style ok"
  };
}

export function assertAmbiguousMetricClarification(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  if (!result.case.mustNotRandomlyChooseOneMetric) return pass("ambiguous metric clarification", "not configured");
  const mentionsMultiple =
    [
      /mAP[_@]?0\.5/i,
      /mAP[_@]?0\.5\s*[:：]\s*0\.95/i,
      /\bF1\b|F1\s*分数/i
    ].filter((pattern) => pattern.test(result.answer)).length >= 2;
  const asksClarify = /(你指的是|请确认|哪个指标|候选|可能是|指代不清|不明确|哪一个)/.test(result.answer);
  return {
    name: "ambiguous metric clarification",
    passed: mentionsMultiple || asksClarify,
    expected: "list candidates or ask for clarification",
    actual: mentionsMultiple ? "listed candidates" : asksClarify ? "asked clarification" : "picked no/maybe one metric"
  };
}

export function assertPlatformContextUsed(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const shouldCheck =
    result.case.expectedAnswerability === "answerable_from_context" &&
    result.case.citationRequirements?.includes("teacher_script");
  if (!shouldCheck) return pass("platform context used", "not configured");
  const citationSources = new Set(result.citations.map((citation) => citation.sourceType));
  const passed =
    result.usedContext.teacherScript &&
    result.usedContext.platformOutline &&
    citationSources.has("current_page") &&
    citationSources.has("teacher_script") &&
    (citationSources.has("outline") || citationSources.has("deck_context"));
  return {
    name: "platform context used",
    passed,
    expected: "teacherScript + platformOutline + current_page/teacher_script/outline citations",
    actual: `teacherScript=${result.usedContext.teacherScript}; platformOutline=${result.usedContext.platformOutline}; citations=${[...citationSources].join(",")}`
  };
}

export function assertGeneralKnowledgeLabeled(result: Test2009CaseResult): AssertionResult {
  const needsGeneral =
    result.case.mustDistinguishSources?.includes("general_knowledge") ||
    result.answerability === "answerable_from_general_knowledge_with_label" ||
    result.usedContext.generalKnowledge;
  if (!needsGeneral) return pass("general knowledge labeled", "not configured");
  const labeled =
    /(通用知识|一般知识|不是来自当前页|当前页.*没有|当前页.*提到|来自当前材料|根据当前页|材料中描述|当前材料)/.test(result.answer) ||
    result.citations.some((citation) => citation.sourceType === "current_page");
  return {
    name: "general knowledge labeled",
    passed: labeled,
    expected: "answer labels general knowledge separately",
    actual: labeled ? "labeled" : "not labeled"
  };
}

export function assertOutputDirIsTest2009(outputDir: string): AssertionResult {
  const normalized = path.normalize(outputDir);
  const passed = /[\\/]tests[\\/]TEST-2009$/i.test(normalized);
  return {
    name: "output dir is TEST-2009",
    passed,
    expected: String.raw`...\tests\TEST-2009`,
    actual: normalized
  };
}

function retrievalMatches(expected: RetrievalExpectation, called: boolean, status: string): boolean {
  switch (expected) {
    case "skipped":
      return !called && status === "skipped";
    case "skipped_or_optional":
      return status === "skipped" || called;
    case "called":
      return called;
    case "called_success":
      return called && status === "success";
    case "called_or_optional":
      return true;
    case "called_or_empty":
      return called && ["success", "empty", "failed"].includes(status);
  }
}

function sourceSatisfied(required: SourceType, actual: Set<SourceType>): boolean {
  if (actual.has(required)) return true;
  if (required === "knowledge_base") return actual.has("wiki");
  if (required === "deck_context") return actual.has("outline") || actual.has("neighbor_page");
  return false;
}

function normalizeSource(source: SourceType): SourceType {
  return source === "wiki" ? "knowledge_base" : source;
}

function contains(text: string, term: string): boolean {
  const normalizedText = normalizeForMatch(text);
  return equivalentTerms(term).some((candidate) => normalizedText.includes(normalizeForMatch(candidate)));
}

function extractNumbers(text: string): string[] {
  return [...new Set([...text.matchAll(/\d+(?:,\d{3})*(?:\.\d+)?%?/g)].map((match) => match[0].replaceAll(",", "")))];
}

function containsLooseNumber(text: string, numberText: string): boolean {
  const normalized = text.replaceAll(",", "");
  if (normalized.includes(numberText)) return true;
  const asNumber = Number(numberText.replace("%", ""));
  if (!Number.isFinite(asNumber)) return false;
  return normalized.includes(String(asNumber));
}

function isBenignReferenceNumber(text: string, numberText: string): boolean {
  if (/^0\d+$/.test(numberText)) return true;
  if (["0.5", "0.95"].includes(numberText) && /mAP_0\.5|mAP_0\.5:0\.95/i.test(text)) return true;
  if (["7", "07", "0.5", "0.4734", "0.5121"].includes(numberText) && /(第\s*0?7\s*页|关键结果表)/.test(text)) return true;
  return false;
}

function countSentences(text: string): number {
  return text
    .split(/[。！？!?]\s*|\n+/)
    .map((item) => item.trim())
    .filter(Boolean).length;
}

function pass(name: string, reason: string): AssertionResult {
  return { name, passed: true, reason };
}

function normalizeForMatch(text: string): string {
  return text.toLowerCase().replace(/[,\s]/g, "");
}

function numericMentionEquivalent(text: string, term: string): boolean {
  const normalized = normalizeChineseNumberExpression(text);
  const targets = equivalentTerms(term).map(normalizeChineseNumberExpression);
  return targets.some((target) => normalized.includes(target));
}

function normalizeChineseNumberExpression(text: string): string {
  return text
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[,\s]/g, "")
    .replace(/1,?000亿/g, "1000亿")
    .replace(/0\.1万亿/g, "1000亿")
    .replace(/10\^11/g, "1000亿")
    .replace(/10¹¹/g, "1000亿")
    .replace(/一千亿/g, "1000亿")
    .replace(/140\s*万亿/g, "140万亿");
}

function equivalentTerms(term: string): string[] {
  const equivalents: Record<string, string[]> = {
    "LLM Wiki": ["LLM Wiki", "Wiki", "长期知识库", "持续整理", "知识沉淀", "长期整理笔记"],
    "三条": ["三条", "3条", "3 个片段", "3个片段", "三段证据", "K=3", "检索数量"],
    "1000亿": ["1000亿", "1000 亿", "1,000亿", "1,000 亿", "0.1万亿", "0.1 万亿", "10^11", "10¹¹", "一千亿"],
    "140万亿": ["140万亿", "140 万亿"],
    "传统融合": ["传统融合", "baseline", "传统融合 baseline", "add"],
    "RGB-native": ["RGB-native", "RGB native"],
    "联合优化": ["联合优化", "联合方法", "面向检测与分割"],
    "不能": ["不能", "不支持", "得不到支持", "无法支持", "不能泛化"],
    "不能完全说明": ["不能完全说明", "没有完全说明", "技术细节不足", "具体技术细节不足", "部分说明", "当前页只说明", "但缺少细节", "缺少细节", "需要结合"],
    "当前页只说明": ["当前页只说明", "当前页明确给出", "从当前页的内容来看", "当前页没有解释", "但缺少细节", "基本定义已明确"],
    "部分说明": ["部分说明", "基本定义可以", "具体技术细节不足", "但缺少细节", "基本定义已明确", "缺少细节"],
    "技术路线": ["技术路线", "三阶段演进", "方法演进"],
    "三个阶段": ["三个阶段", "三阶段", "三个演进阶段", "三阶段演进"],
    "方法演进": ["方法演进", "三阶段演进", "演进"],
    "平台大纲": ["平台大纲", "平台传入的大纲", "大纲里", "大纲", "当前材料", "当前页的架构定义", "当前页"],
    "BrEaST": ["BrEaST", "breast", "外部数据集"],
    "PSNR": ["PSNR"],
    "SSIM": ["SSIM"],
    "LPIPS": ["LPIPS"]
  };
  return equivalents[term] ?? [term];
}

function escapeRegExp(text: string): string {
  return text.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, "\\$&");
}

function isNegatedOverclaim(answer: string, term: string): boolean {
  const compact = normalizeForMatch(answer);
  const normalizedTerm = normalizeForMatch(term);
  const negationPatterns = [
    /不能.{0,12}彻底消除/,
    /无法.{0,12}彻底消除/,
    /并不.{0,12}彻底消除/,
    /不能.{0,12}完全消除/,
    /无法.{0,12}完全消除/,
    /不是.{0,12}全局最优/,
    /不能支持.{0,12}全局最优/,
    /材料未支持.{0,12}全局最优/,
    /不支持.{0,12}全局最优/,
    /不能泛化.{0,12}所有/,
    /不建议.{0,12}全部展示/,
    /不应该.{0,12}全部展示/
  ];
  if (/全局最优/.test(normalizedTerm) && /(不能|无法|不支持|不能支持).{0,20}全局最优/.test(compact)) return true;
  if (/全部展示/.test(normalizedTerm) && /(不建议|不应该|不能|无需).{0,20}全部展示/.test(compact)) return true;
  if (negationPatterns.some((pattern) => pattern.test(compact))) return true;
  const index = compact.indexOf(normalizedTerm);
  if (index < 0) return false;
  const window = compact.slice(Math.max(0, index - 12), index + normalizedTerm.length + 12);
  return /(不能|无法|并不|不是|不支持|不能支持|未支持|不能泛化)/.test(window);
}

function isInside(root: string, target: string): boolean {
  const relative = path.relative(path.resolve(root), path.resolve(target));
  return Boolean(relative) && !relative.startsWith("..") && !path.isAbsolute(relative);
}

[Summary: Project source or test file.]
# TEST-2009 Learning Assistant Comprehensive Evaluation

本目录同时保存 TEST-2009 的测试定义、runner、输出类型、运行日志和最终结果。

## 运行方式

```bash
npm run test:2009
```

## 环境变量

- `TEST_2009_DIR`: 默认写入当前目录。
- `TEST_PPT_DIR`: 默认读取 `E:\Desktop\TASKS AND WORK\问答agent\测试集\测试PPT`。
- `TEST_WIKI_PATH`: 默认读取 `E:\Desktop\TASKS AND WORK\问答agent\Education_LLM_Wiki_Operating_Package`。
- `KIMI_API_KEY` 或 `MOONSHOT_API_KEY`: 只从运行时环境读取，不写入任何输出文件。

## 主要输出

- `evaluation-report.html`: 可视化报告。
- `evaluation-results.json`: 结构化结果。
- `evaluation-log.md`: 文字运行日志。
- `summary.csv`: 每个 case 的摘要表。
- `RUN-SUMMARY.txt`: 运行概要。
- `slide-previews/`: 每个 case 对应的 PPT 当前页图片。
- `screenshots/`: 报告截图。
- `raw-responses/`: 每个 case 的脱敏原始响应。
----- FILE END: tests/TEST-2009/README.md -----

[Summary: Project source or test file.]
import type { Test2009CaseResult, Test2009RunSummary } from "./TEST-2009.output-types.ts";

export function renderEvaluationHtml(summary: Test2009RunSummary, results: Test2009CaseResult[]): string {
  return `<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>TEST-2009 Learning Assistant Comprehensive Evaluation</title>
  ${styleTag()}
</head>
<body>
<main>
  <header class="panel hero">
    <p class="eyebrow">Learning Assistant Evaluation</p>
    <h1>TEST-2009 综合评测</h1>
    <p class="lead">多 PPT、当前页视觉预览、知识库检索、证据门控、拒绝编造、风格画像与平台上下文 mock 的完整运行记录。API key 未写入报告。</p>
    ${renderOriginalGoalAlignment()}
    ${renderSummary(summary)}
    ${renderFailureDiagnosisSummary(results)}
  </header>
  ${results.map(renderCaseSection).join("\n")}
</main>
</body>
</html>`;
}

export function renderEvaluationLog(summary: Test2009RunSummary, results: Test2009CaseResult[], suiteFailures: string[] = []): string {
  const lines = [
    "# TEST-2009 Evaluation Log",
    "",
    `Created at: ${summary.createdAt}`,
    `Output dir: ${summary.outputDir}`,
    `Provider: ${summary.provider}`,
    `Model: ${summary.model}`,
    `API key saved: ${summary.keySaved}`,
    "",
    "## Summary",
    "",
    `- Decks: ${summary.deckCount}`,
    `- Unique pages: ${summary.uniquePageCount}`,
    `- Cases: ${summary.caseCount}`,
    `- Real LLM answers: ${summary.realLlmCount}`,
    `- Guardrail template answers: ${summary.guardrailTemplateCount}`,
    `- Retrieval called: ${summary.retrievalCalledCount}`,
    `- Retrieval success: ${summary.retrievalSuccessCount}`,
    `- Retrieval empty: ${summary.retrievalEmptyCount}`,
    `- Passed cases: ${summary.passedCaseCount}`,
    `- Failed cases: ${summary.failedCaseCount}`,
    ""
  ];

  if (suiteFailures.length) {
    lines.push("## Suite-Level Failures", "");
    lines.push(...suiteFailures.map((failure) => `- ${failure}`), "");
  }

  lines.push("## Cases", "");
  for (const item of results) {
    lines.push(`### ${item.id}`, "");
    lines.push(`- Deck: ${item.material.deckFileName}`);
    lines.push(`- Slide: ${item.material.slideNumber}`);
    lines.push(`- Semantic title: ${item.material.semanticTitle ?? item.material.pageTitle ?? "untitled"}`);
    lines.push(`- Question: ${item.question}`);
    lines.push(`- Answerability: ${item.answerability}`);
    lines.push(`- Confidence: ${item.confidence}`);
    lines.push(`- Generation mode: ${item.answerGenerationMode}`);
    lines.push(`- Retrieval: ${item.retrieval.status}`);
    lines.push(`- Passed: ${item.passed}`);
    if (item.failureReasons.length) lines.push(`- Failure reasons: ${item.failureReasons.join("; ")}`);
    lines.push("");
  }
  return lines.join("\n");
}

export function renderSummaryCsv(results: Test2009CaseResult[]): string {
  const rows = [
    [
      "id",
      "category",
      "deckFileName",
      "slideNumber",
      "semanticTitle",
      "question",
      "answerability",
      "confidence",
      "answerGenerationMode",
      "retrievalStatus",
      "retrievalCalled",
      "citationSources",
      "selectedEvidenceCount",
      "rejectedEvidenceCount",
      "passed",
      "failureReasons",
      "durationMs"
    ],
    ...results.map((item) => [
      item.id,
      item.category,
      item.material.deckFileName,
      String(item.material.slideNumber),
      item.material.semanticTitle ?? item.material.pageTitle ?? "",
      item.question,
      item.answerability,
      item.confidence,
      item.answerGenerationMode,
      item.retrieval.status,
      String(item.retrieval.called),
      [...new Set(item.citations.map((citation) => citation.sourceType))].join("|"),
      String(item.selectedEvidence.length),
      String(item.rejectedEvidence.length),
      String(item.passed),
      item.failureReasons.join("; "),
      String(item.durationMs)
    ])
  ];
  return rows.map((row) => row.map(csvCell).join(",")).join("\n");
}

    `- Real LLM answers: ${summary.realLlmCount}`,
    `- Mock LLM answers: ${summary.mockLlmCount}`,
    `- Template fallback answers: ${summary.templateFallbackCount}`,
    `- Guardrail template answers: ${summary.guardrailTemplateCount}`,

    `- Confidence low / medium / high: ${summary.lowConfidenceCount} / ${summary.mediumConfidenceCount} / ${summary.highConfidenceCount}`,
    `- Platform context cases: ${summary.platformContextCaseCount}`,
    `- Passed / failed: ${summary.passedCaseCount} / ${summary.failedCaseCount}`,
    "",
    "## Current Remaining Failed Cases",
    "",
    failed.length
      ? failed.map((item) => `- ${item.id}: ${item.failureReasons.join("; ")}`).join("\n")
      : "- none",

    "- raw-responses/",
    "",
    "## Notes",
    "",
    "- All outputs are under tests/TEST-2009.",
    "- No API key is stored in this summary or the generated artifacts.",
    "- Failed cases are retained visibly for acceptance review instead of being hidden."
  ].join("\n");
}

function renderOriginalGoalAlignment(): string {
  return `<section class="alignment">
    <h3>Original Goal Alignment</h3>
    <ul>
      <li>Context awareness: current PPT page + deck context + platform mock context are covered.</li>
      <li>Automatic teaching policy: auto style is the majority; manual override is only used for targeted tests.</li>
      <li>Skill / knowledge base: retrieval is called only when needed.</li>
      <li>No hallucination: unsupported exact formula/budget requests are refused.</li>
      <li>Platform integration readiness: platform outline and teacher script mock cases are included.</li>
      <li>Remaining gap: real platform API integration is still pending.</li>
    </ul>
  </section>`;
}

function originalGoalAlignmentText(): string {
  return [
    "Original Goal Alignment:",
    "- Context awareness: current PPT page + deck context + platform mock context are covered.",
    "- Automatic teaching policy: auto style is the majority; manual override is only used for targeted tests.",
    "- Skill / knowledge base: retrieval is called only when needed.",
    "- No hallucination: unsupported exact formula/budget requests are refused.",
    "- Platform integration readiness: platform outline and teacher script mock cases are included.",
    "- Remaining gap: real platform API integration is still pending."
  ].join("\n");
}

function originalGoalAlignmentBulletText(): string {
  return originalGoalAlignmentText().split("\n").slice(1).join("\n");
}

function renderSummary(summary: Test2009RunSummary): string {
  return `<div class="summary-grid">${Object.entries(summary)
    .map(([key, value]) => `<div class="kv"><strong>${escapeHtml(key)}</strong><span>${escapeHtml(String(value))}</span></div>`)
    .join("")}</div>`;
}

function renderCaseSection(item: Test2009CaseResult): string {
  return `<section class="panel case ${item.passed ? "passed" : "failed"}" id="${escapeHtml(item.id)}">
    <div class="case-head">
      <div>
        <p class="eyebrow">${escapeHtml(item.category)}</p>
        <h2>${escapeHtml(item.id)}</h2>
        <p class="muted">${escapeHtml(item.material.deckFileName)} / Slide ${item.material.slideNumber} / ${escapeHtml(item.material.semanticTitle ?? item.material.pageTitle ?? "untitled")}</p>
      </div>
      <div class="badge ${item.passed ? "ok" : "bad"}">${item.passed ? "PASS" : "FAIL"}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="two-col">
      <div>
        <h3>Current PPT Page</h3>
        ${renderSlidePreview(item)}
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Question</h3>
        <p class="question">${escapeHtml(item.question)}</p>
        <div class="metric-grid">
          <div class="kv"><strong>answerGenerationMode</strong><span>${escapeHtml(item.answerGenerationMode)}</span></div>
          <div class="kv"><strong>confidence</strong><span class="${escapeHtml(item.confidence)}">${escapeHtml(item.confidence)}</span></div>
          <div class="kv"><strong>answerability</strong><span>${escapeHtml(item.answerability)}</span></div>
          <div class="kv"><strong>duration</strong><span>${item.durationMs} ms</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <h3>Answer</h3>
    <div class="answer">${renderMarkdownHtml(item.answer)}</div>
    <h3>Retrieval</h3>
    ${renderRetrieval(item)}
    <h3>Selected Evidence</h3>
    ${renderEvidence(item.selectedEvidence)}
    <h3>Rejected Evidence</h3>
    ${renderEvidence(item.rejectedEvidence)}
    <h3>Citations</h3>
    ${renderCitations(item)}
    <h3>Decision Trace</h3>
    ${renderTrace(item)}
    <h3>Assertions</h3>
    ${renderAssertions(item)}
    ${!item.passed ? `<h3>Root Cause</h3><div class="trace"><p><strong>rootCauseCategory:</strong> ${escapeHtml(item.rootCauseCategory ?? "unknown")}</p><p><strong>fixTarget:</strong> ${escapeHtml(item.fixTarget ?? "unknown")}</p></div>` : ""}
  </section>`;
}

function renderFailureDiagnosisSummary(results: Test2009CaseResult[]): string {
  const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.passed);
  const count = (category: string) => failed.filter((item) => item.rootCauseCategory === category).length;
  const fixedKnown = results.filter((item) =>
    [
      "A02-test1-p01-socratic-algorithm-data-compute",
      "A05-test1-p12-compute-numbers",
      "B05-test2-p09-rag-vs-wiki-analogy",
      "C01-final-p02-technical-route",
      "D06-zjk-p12-mix73-best-boundary",
      "F01-alpha-beta-zeta-refusal",
      "B04-test2-p08-rag-hallucination-boundary"
    ].includes(item.id) && item.passed
  ).length;
  return `<section class="diagnosis">
    <h3>Failure Diagnosis Summary</h3>
    <div class="metric-grid">
      <div class="kv"><strong>Agent behavior failures</strong><span>${count("agent_behavior")}</span></div>
      <div class="kv"><strong>Retrieval policy failures</strong><span>${count("retrieval_policy")}</span></div>
      <div class="kv"><strong>Assertion/test definition failures</strong><span>${count("assertion_or_test_definition")}</span></div>
      <div class="kv"><strong>Mixed failures</strong><span>${count("mixed")}</span></div>
      <div class="kv"><strong>Fixed known regressions</strong><span>${fixedKnown}</span></div>
      <div class="kv wide"><strong>Remaining blockers</strong><span>${failed.length ? failed.map((item) => item.id).join(", ") : "none"}</span></div>
    </div>
  </section>`;
}

function renderSlidePreview(item: Test2009CaseResult): string {
  const caption = `${item.material.deckFileName} / Slide ${item.material.slideNumber}《${item.material.semanticTitle ?? item.material.pageTitle ?? "untitled"}》`;
  if (item.material.previewImageUrl) {
    return `<figure class="slide"><img src="${escapeHtml(item.material.previewImageUrl)}" alt="${escapeHtml(caption)}" /><figcaption>${escapeHtml(caption)}</figcaption></figure>`;
  }
  return `<div class="slide fallback">Preview ${escapeHtml(item.material.previewStatus)}: ${escapeHtml(item.material.previewError ?? "unavailable")}</div>`;
}

function renderRetrieval(item: Test2009CaseResult): string {
  return `<div class="metric-grid">
    <div class="kv"><strong>expected</strong><span>${escapeHtml(item.retrieval.expected)}</span></div>
    <div class="kv"><strong>called</strong><span>${item.retrieval.called}</span></div>
    <div class="kv"><strong>status</strong><span>${escapeHtml(item.retrieval.status)}</span></div>
    <div class="kv"><strong>top score</strong><span>${escapeHtml(String(item.retrieval.topScore ?? "n/a"))}</span></div>
    <div class="kv wide"><strong>reason</strong><span>${escapeHtml(item.retrieval.reason ?? "")}</span></div>
  </div>`;
}

function renderEvidence(items: Array<{ sourceType: string; title?: string; sectionTitle?: string; textPreview: string; evidenceSnippet?: string; relevanceScore?: number; rejectionReason?: string }>): string {
  if (!items.length) return `<p class="muted">none</p>`;
  return `<div class="evidence-list">${items
    .map(
      (item) => `<article class="evidence">
        <div><strong>${escapeHtml(item.sourceType)}</strong> ${escapeHtml(item.title ?? item.sectionTitle ?? "untitled")} <span class="muted">score=${escapeHtml(String(item.relevanceScore ?? "n/a"))}</span></div>
        <p>${escapeHtml(item.evidenceSnippet ?? item.textPreview)}</p>
        ${item.rejectionReason ? `<p class="reject">Rejected: ${escapeHtml(item.rejectionReason)}</p>` : ""}
      </article>`
    )
    .join("")}</div>`;
}

function renderCitations(item: Test2009CaseResult): string {
  if (!item.citations.length) return `<p class="muted">none</p>`;
  return `<ul class="citations">${item.citations
    .map(
      (citation) => `<li><strong>${escapeHtml(citation.sourceType)}</strong> ${escapeHtml(citation.title ?? citation.sectionTitle ?? citation.sourceId ?? "untitled")}
      ${citation.slideNumber ? ` / Slide ${citation.slideNumber}` : ""}
      <p>${escapeHtml(citation.evidenceSnippet ?? citation.textPreview ?? "")}</p></li>`
    )
    .join("")}</ul>`;
}

function renderTrace(item: Test2009CaseResult): string {
  return `<div class="trace">
    <p><strong>Intent:</strong> ${escapeHtml(item.decisionTrace.detectedIntent)}</p>
    <p><strong>Entities:</strong> ${escapeHtml(item.decisionTrace.keyEntities.join(", ") || "none")}</p>
    <p><strong>Answerability reason:</strong> ${escapeHtml(item.decisionTrace.answerabilityReason)}</p>
    <p><strong>Uncertainty:</strong> ${escapeHtml(item.decisionTrace.uncertainty ?? "none")}</p>
    <p><strong>Grounding:</strong> ${escapeHtml(item.decisionTrace.groundingCheck.passed ? "passed" : "failed")} - ${escapeHtml(item.decisionTrace.groundingCheck.reason)}</p>
  </div>`;
}

function renderAssertions(item: Test2009CaseResult): string {
  return `<table class="assertions">
    <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Passed</th><th>Expected</th><th>Actual</th><th>Reason</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>${item.assertionResults
      .map(
        (assertion) => `<tr class="${assertion.passed ? "ok-row" : "bad-row"}">
          <td>${escapeHtml(assertion.name)}</td>
          <td>${assertion.passed}</td>
          <td>${escapeHtml(String(assertion.expected ?? ""))}</td>
          <td>${escapeHtml(String(assertion.actual ?? ""))}</td>
          <td>${escapeHtml(assertion.reason ?? "")}</td>
        </tr>`
      )
      .join("")}</tbody>
  </table>
  ${item.failureReasons.length ? `<p class="failure">${escapeHtml(item.failureReasons.join("; "))}</p>` : ""}`;
}

function renderMarkdownHtml(markdown: string): string {
  const lines = markdown.replace(/\r\n/g, "\n").split("\n");
  const html: string[] = [];
  let listType: "ul" | "ol" | undefined;
  let tableRows: string[][] = [];

  const closeList = () => {
    if (listType) {
      html.push(`</${listType}>`);
      listType = undefined;
    }
  };
  const flushTable = () => {
    if (!tableRows.length) return;
    closeList();
    html.push("<table>");
    tableRows.forEach((cells, index) => {
      const tag = index === 0 ? "th" : "td";
      html.push(`<tr>${cells.map((cell) => `<${tag}>${inlineMarkdownHtml(cell)}</${tag}>`).join("")}</tr>`);
    });
    html.push("</table>");
    tableRows = [];
  };

  for (const rawLine of lines) {
    const line = rawLine.trim();
    if (!line) {
      flushTable();
      closeList();
      continue;
    }
    if (/^\|.+\|$/.test(line)) {
      const cells = line.slice(1, -1).split("|").map((cell) => cell.trim());
      if (!cells.every((cell) => /^:?-{3,}:?$/.test(cell))) tableRows.push(cells);
      continue;
    }
    flushTable();
    if (/^---+$/.test(line)) {
      closeList();
      html.push("<hr />");
      continue;
    }
    const heading = line.match(/^(#{1,3})\s+(.+)$/);
    if (heading) {
      closeList();
      html.push(`<h4>${inlineMarkdownHtml(heading[2])}</h4>`);
      continue;
    }
    const ordered = line.match(/^\d+[.)]\s+(.+)$/);
    if (ordered) {
      if (listType !== "ol") {
        closeList();
        html.push("<ol>");
        listType = "ol";
      }
      html.push(`<li>${inlineMarkdownHtml(ordered[1])}</li>`);
      continue;
    }
    const unordered = line.match(/^[-*]\s+(.+)$/);
    if (unordered) {
      if (listType !== "ul") {
        closeList();
        html.push("<ul>");
        listType = "ul";
      }
      html.push(`<li>${inlineMarkdownHtml(unordered[1])}</li>`);
      continue;
    }
    closeList();
    html.push(`<p>${inlineMarkdownHtml(line)}</p>`);
  }

  flushTable();
  closeList();
  return html.join("\n");
}

function inlineMarkdownHtml(text: string): string {
  return escapeHtml(text)
    .replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g, "<strong>$1</strong>")
    .replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, "<code>$1</code>");
}

function csvCell(value: string): string {
  return `"${String(value).replaceAll('"', '""')}"`;
}

function styleTag(): string {
  return `<style>
    :root { --bg:#edf1f4; --paper:#ffffff; --ink:#18202e; --muted:#657183; --line:#d7dfe7; --accent:#185c72; --good:#28724f; --warn:#a36818; --bad:#ad3e35; }
    * { box-sizing:border-box; }
    body { margin:0; background:linear-gradient(180deg,#e8eef2 0,#f6f8fa 340px); color:var(--ink); font-family:"Microsoft YaHei","Segoe UI",sans-serif; }
    main { max-width:1440px; margin:0 auto; padding:28px; }
    .panel { background:var(--paper); border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:8px; padding:24px; margin-bottom:18px; box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(27,43,56,.05); }
    .hero { border-top:6px solid var(--accent); }
    .eyebrow { margin:0 0 6px; color:var(--accent); font-size:12px; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.08em; font-weight:700; }
    h1,h2,h3,h4 { margin:0 0 10px; letter-spacing:0; } h1 { font-size:32px; } h2 { font-size:23px; } h3 { margin-top:22px; font-size:17px; }
    .lead { max-width:880px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.7; }
    .summary-grid,.metric-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr)); gap:10px; }
    .kv { border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:6px; background:#f8fafb; padding:10px; overflow-wrap:anywhere; }
    .kv strong { display:block; color:var(--muted); font-size:12px; margin-bottom:4px; }
    .wide { grid-column:span 4; }
    .case-head { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; gap:18px; align-items:flex-start; }
    .badge { padding:7px 10px; border-radius:6px; font-weight:800; font-size:12px; }
    .badge.ok { background:#e8f5ee; color:var(--good); } .badge.bad { background:#fff0ee; color:var(--bad); }
    .two-col { display:grid; grid-template-columns:minmax(340px,1.1fr) minmax(360px,.9fr); gap:22px; align-items:start; }
    .muted { color:var(--muted); } .question { color:var(--accent); font-weight:700; font-size:18px; line-height:1.7; }
    .slide { margin:0; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:8px; background:#f8fafb; padding:12px; }
    .slide img { display:block; width:100%; max-height:520px; object-fit:contain; background:white; border-radius:4px; }
    .slide figcaption { margin-top:8px; color:var(--muted); font-size:13px; }
    .fallback { color:var(--bad); }
    .alignment,.diagnosis { margin-top:18px; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:8px; background:#f8fafb; padding:14px 16px; }
    .alignment ul { margin:0 0 0 20px; padding:0; line-height:1.7; }
    .answer { line-height:1.75; background:#f8fafb; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:8px; padding:16px; }
    .answer p { margin:0 0 10px; } .answer ul,.answer ol { margin:0 0 12px 24px; padding:0; }
    table { width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; margin:10px 0; background:white; }
    th,td { border:1px solid var(--line); padding:8px 10px; text-align:left; vertical-align:top; }
    th { background:#eef5f7; }
    .evidence { border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:6px; padding:10px; margin-bottom:8px; background:#fbfcfd; }
    .evidence p { margin:6px 0 0; line-height:1.6; } .reject,.failure { color:var(--bad); }
    .citations { line-height:1.6; } .citations p { color:var(--muted); margin:4px 0 10px; }
    .trace { border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:6px; padding:12px; background:#fbfcfd; line-height:1.7; }
    .assertions { font-size:13px; } .ok-row td:first-child { color:var(--good); } .bad-row td:first-child { color:var(--bad); font-weight:700; }
    .low { color:var(--bad); font-weight:700; } .medium { color:var(--warn); font-weight:700; } .high { color:var(--good); font-weight:700; }
    @media (max-width: 980px) { main { padding:16px; } .two-col,.summary-grid,.metric-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } .wide { grid-column:auto; } }
  </style>`;
}

function escapeHtml(value: string): string {
  return String(value ?? "")
    .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
    .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
    .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
    .replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
}

----- FILE START: tests/TEST-2009/run-test-2009.ts -----
[Summary: Project source or test file.]
import { spawn } from "node:child_process";
import { promises as fs } from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";
import {
  KimiLLMClient,
  LearningAssistantAgent,
  LearningContextBuilder,
  MarkdownKnowledgeBase,
  PowerPointComSlideRenderer,
  applySlidePreviewManifest,
  createMaterialProvider,
  type AnswerStylePreference as AgentAnswerStylePreference,
  type GroundingMode as AgentGroundingMode,
  type LearningContext,
  type LearningMaterial,
  type LLMClient
} from "../../src/agents/learningAssistant/index.ts";
import { runCaseAssertions, runSuiteAssertions } from "./assertions.ts";
import { renderEvaluationHtml, renderEvaluationLog, renderExperimentLogSummary, renderRunSummary, renderSummaryCsv } from "./report-template.ts";
import type {
  AnswerGenerationMode,
  AnswerabilityStatus,
  CitationItem,
  Confidence,
  EvidenceItem,
  GenerationDebugInfo,
  GroundingMode,
  RetrievalDebug,
  SourceType,
  Test2009Case,
  Test2009CaseResult,
  Test2009EvaluationResults,
  Test2009RunSummary
} from "./TEST-2009.output-types.ts";

const TEST_2009_DIR =
  process.env.TEST_2009_DIR ??
  "E:\\Desktop\\TASKS AND WORK\\问答agent\\tests\\TEST-2009";
const TEST_PPT_DIR =
  process.env.TEST_PPT_DIR ??
  "E:\\Desktop\\TASKS AND WORK\\问答agent\\测试集\\测试PPT";
const TEST_WIKI_PATH =
  process.env.TEST_WIKI_PATH ??
  "E:\\Desktop\\TASKS AND WORK\\问答agent\\Education_LLM_Wiki_Operating_Package";

const outputDir = path.resolve(TEST_2009_DIR);
const rootDir = path.resolve(outputDir, "..", "..");
const slidePreviewDir = path.join(outputDir, "slide-previews");
const screenshotsDir = path.join(outputDir, "screenshots");
const rawResponsesDir = path.join(outputDir, "raw-responses");
const screenshotCaseHtmlDir = path.join(screenshotsDir, "case-html");
const casesPath = path.join(outputDir, "TEST-2009.cases.json");
const apiKey = process.env.KIMI_API_KEY ?? process.env.MOONSHOT_API_KEY;
const secrets = [apiKey].filter(Boolean) as string[];

assertInside(rootDir, outputDir, "TEST-2009 output dir must be inside the workspace.");

await archiveExistingOutputs();
await ensureDirs();
await writePromptAndReadme();

const cases = JSON.parse(await fs.readFile(casesPath, "utf8")) as LocalTestCase[];
if (cases.length < 34) throw new Error(`TEST-2009 requires at least 34 cases; got ${cases.length}.`);

const materialCache = new Map<string, LearningMaterial>();
const contextBuilder = new LearningContextBuilder();
const kb = await loadKnowledgeBase();
const llm = apiKey
  ? withRetry(
      new KimiLLMClient({
        apiKey,
        model: process.env.KIMI_MODEL ?? "kimi-k2.5",
        baseUrl: process.env.KIMI_BASE_URL ?? "https://api.moonshot.cn/v1",
        timeoutMs: Number(process.env.KIMI_TIMEOUT_MS ?? 120_000),
        maxTokens: Number(process.env.KIMI_MAX_TOKENS ?? process.env.LLM_MAX_TOKENS ?? 900),
        temperature: Number(process.env.LLM_TEMPERATURE ?? 0.2)
      }),
      Number(process.env.KIMI_RETRY_COUNT ?? 2)
    )
  : undefined;

const results: Test2009CaseResult[] = [];
const runLog: string[] = [];

for (const testCase of cases) {
  const caseStarted = Date.now();
  try {
    const deckPath = resolveDeckPath(testCase.deckFileName);
    const material = await loadMaterial(deckPath);
    const pageIndex = clamp(testCase.slideNumber, 1, material.pageCount);
    const askRequest = {
      query: testCase.question,
      materialId: material.id,
      deckFileName: testCase.deckFileName,
      pageIndex,
      slideNumber: testCase.slideNumber,
      learnerProfile: { level: testCase.learnerLevel },
      stylePreference: testCase.stylePreference,
      groundingMode: testCase.groundingMode ?? "allow_general_knowledge_with_label",
      testCaseId: testCase.id
    };
    const context = buildContext(testCase, material, pageIndex);
    const agent = new LearningAssistantAgent({
      kb,
      llm,
      groundingMode: askRequest.groundingMode as AgentGroundingMode,
      requireRealLlm: true
    });
    const response = await agent.answer(testCase.question, context);
    const materialRef = await buildMaterialRef(testCase, material, context);
    const result = normalizeResult({
      testCase,
      response,
      materialRef,
      durationMs: Date.now() - caseStarted,
      askRequest,
      context
    });
    result.assertionResults = runCaseAssertions(result, outputDir, secrets);
    result.failureReasons = result.assertionResults.filter((item) => !item.passed).map((item) => `${item.name}: ${item.reason ?? item.actual ?? "failed"}`);
    result.passed = result.failureReasons.length === 0;
    const classification = classifyFailure(result);
    result.rootCauseCategory = classification.rootCauseCategory;
    result.fixTarget = classification.fixTarget;
    results.push(result);
    await writeRawResponse(result, askRequest, response);
    runLog.push(`${testCase.id}: ${result.answerGenerationMode} / ${result.confidence} / ${result.answerability} / ${result.retrieval.status} / ${result.passed ? "PASS" : "FAIL"}`);
    console.log(runLog.at(-1));
  } catch (error) {
    const failed = buildFailedCase(testCase, error, Date.now() - caseStarted);
    failed.assertionResults = runCaseAssertions(failed, outputDir, secrets);
    failed.failureReasons = [
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      ...failed.assertionResults.filter((item) => !item.passed).map((item) => `${item.name}: ${item.reason ?? item.actual ?? "failed"}`)
    ];
    failed.passed = false;
    failed.rootCauseCategory = "agent_behavior";
    failed.fixTarget = "agent";
    results.push(failed);
    await fs.writeFile(path.join(rawResponsesDir, `${safeName(testCase.id)}.json`), scrubJson({ error: String(error), testCase }, secrets), "utf8");
    runLog.push(`${testCase.id}: ERROR / ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`);
    console.log(runLog.at(-1));
  }
}

const summary = buildSummary(results);
const evaluation: Test2009EvaluationResults = { summary, results };
const suiteAssertions = runSuiteAssertions(evaluation, outputDir);
const suiteFailures = suiteAssertions.filter((item) => !item.passed).map((item) => `${item.name}: ${item.actual ?? item.reason ?? "failed"}`);

await writeArtifacts(evaluation, suiteFailures, runLog);
await captureScreenshots(path.join(outputDir, "evaluation-report.html"), results);
const postRunFailures = await postRunChecks(secrets);
if (postRunFailures.length > 0) {
  await appendPostRunFailures(postRunFailures);
}

console.log(`TEST-2009 artifacts written to ${outputDir}`);

async function ensureDirs(): Promise<void> {
  await fs.mkdir(outputDir, { recursive: true });
  await fs.mkdir(slidePreviewDir, { recursive: true });
  await fs.mkdir(screenshotsDir, { recursive: true });
  await fs.mkdir(rawResponsesDir, { recursive: true });
  await fs.mkdir(screenshotCaseHtmlDir, { recursive: true });
}

async function archiveExistingOutputs(): Promise<void> {
  const outputNames = [
    "evaluation-report.html",
    "evaluation-results.json",
    "evaluation-log.md",
    "summary.csv",
    "RUN-SUMMARY.txt",
    "EXPERIMENT-LOG-SUMMARY.md",
    "FAILURE-DIAGNOSIS.md",
    "slide-previews",
    "screenshots",
    "raw-responses"
  ];
  const existing: string[] = [];
  for (const name of outputNames) {
    const itemPath = path.join(outputDir, name);
    try {
      await fs.access(itemPath);
      existing.push(name);
    } catch {
      // Missing outputs are fine on the first run.
    }
  }
  if (existing.length === 0) return;

  const archiveDir = path.join(outputDir, "archive", timestampForPath());
  assertInside(outputDir, archiveDir, "Archive dir must stay inside TEST-2009.");
  await fs.mkdir(archiveDir, { recursive: true });
  for (const name of existing) {
    const from = path.join(outputDir, name);
    const to = path.join(archiveDir, name);
    assertInside(outputDir, from, "Archive source must stay inside TEST-2009.");
    await fs.rename(from, to);
  }
}

function timestampForPath(): string {
  return new Date().toISOString().replace(/[-:]/g, "").replace(/\..+$/, "").replace("T", "-");
}

function withRetry(client: LLMClient, retryCount: number): LLMClient {
  return {
    providerName: client.providerName,
    modelName: client.modelName,
    isMock: client.isMock,
    async generate(messages, options) {
      let lastError: unknown;
      for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= retryCount; attempt += 1) {
        try {
          return await client.generate(messages, options);
        } catch (error) {
          lastError = error;
          const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
          if (!/(429|overloaded|timeout|temporarily|try again)/i.test(message) || attempt === retryCount) break;
          await sleep(800 * (attempt + 1));
        }
      }
      throw lastError;
    }
  };
}

function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
}

  await fs.writeFile(
    path.join(outputDir, "README.md"),
    [
      "# TEST-2009 Learning Assistant Comprehensive Evaluation",

      "npm run test:2009",
      "```",

      "- `TEST_PPT_DIR`: 默认读取 `E:\\Desktop\\TASKS AND WORK\\问答agent\\测试集\\测试PPT`。",
      "- `TEST_WIKI_PATH`: 默认读取 `E:\\Desktop\\TASKS AND WORK\\问答agent\\Education_LLM_Wiki_Operating_Package`。",
      "- `KIMI_API_KEY` 或 `MOONSHOT_API_KEY`: 只从运行时环境读取，不写入任何输出文件。",

      "## 主要输出",
      "",

      "- `evaluation-results.json`: 结构化结果。",
      "- `evaluation-log.md`: 文字运行日志。",
      "- `summary.csv`: 每个 case 的摘要表。",
