async function loadKnowledgeBase(): Promise<MarkdownKnowledgeBase | undefined> {
  try {
    await fs.stat(TEST_WIKI_PATH);
    return await MarkdownKnowledgeBase.fromPaths({
      rootDir,
      paths: [path.relative(rootDir, TEST_WIKI_PATH)]
    });
  } catch (error) {
    await fs.writeFile(
      path.join(outputDir, "KNOWLEDGE_BASE_LOAD_FAILED.txt"),
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      "utf8"
    );
    return undefined;
  }
}

function resolveDeckPath(deckFileName: string): string {
  const deckPath = path.resolve(TEST_PPT_DIR, deckFileName);
  assertInside(rootDir, deckPath, `Deck path is outside workspace: ${deckFileName}`);
  return deckPath;
}

async function loadMaterial(filePath: string): Promise<LearningMaterial> {
  const resolved = path.resolve(filePath);
  const cached = materialCache.get(resolved);
  if (cached) return cached;

  const provider = createMaterialProvider({ type: "pptx", filePath: resolved });
  const material = await provider.load({ type: "pptx", filePath: resolved, metadata: { workspaceRoot: rootDir } });
  const renderer = new PowerPointComSlideRenderer({
    rootDir,
    cacheRoot: path.join(slidePreviewDir, ".renderer-cache")
  });
  const manifest = await renderer.renderDeck({
    type: "pptx",
    filePath: resolved,
    metadata: { materialId: material.id, pageCount: material.pageCount }
  });
  applySlidePreviewManifest(material, manifest);
  materialCache.set(resolved, material);
  return material;
}

function buildContext(testCase: LocalTestCase, material: LearningMaterial, pageIndex: number): LearningContext {
  const page = material.pages.find((item) => item.pageIndex === pageIndex);
  const pageTitle = page?.semanticTitle ?? page?.title ?? `Slide ${pageIndex}`;
  const pageSummary = summarize(page?.text, 260);
  const isHarnessCase = testCase.id === "H01-platform-context-outline-teacher-script";
  const platformOutline = testCase.platformContextMock
    ? {
        source: "platform" as const,
        items: [
          {
            id: `platform-section-${safeName(testCase.id)}`,
            title: isHarnessCase ? "平台大纲：Agent 编排与学习助教上下文" : `平台大纲：${pageTitle}`,
            summary: isHarnessCase
              ? "这一节说明 Harness 负责把模型、当前页、工具、检索、历史对话和 UI 协议组织成可用的学习助教。"
              : `平台传入的大纲摘要：当前页围绕“${pageTitle}”展开。${pageSummary}`,
            pageStart: pageIndex,
            pageEnd: pageIndex
          }
        ]
      }
    : undefined;
  const platformTeacherScript = testCase.platformContextMock
    ? {
        source: "platform" as const,
        text: isHarnessCase
          ? "教师讲稿：Harness 不是模型本身，而是围绕模型的编排层。它负责接收平台上下文、规划是否检索知识库、调用 skill、整理 evidence，并把结构化结果返回给学习平台。"
          : `教师讲稿：这一页的讲解重点是“${pageTitle}”。回答学生问题时应先使用当前页内容，再结合平台大纲判断它在课程中的位置。`,
        segments: [
          {
            pageId: `${material.id}-page-${pageIndex}`,
            pageIndex,
            text: isHarnessCase
              ? "Harness 不是模型本身，而是把模型放进可控学习流程里的编排层。"
              : `当前页讲解重点：${pageTitle}`
          }
        ]
      }
    : undefined;

  const stylePreference = toAgentStyle(testCase.stylePreference);
  return contextBuilder.build({
    material,
    pageIndex,
    platformOutline,
    platformTeacherScript,
    stylePreference,
    learner: {
      id: `test-2009-${testCase.id}`,
      profile: {
        level: testCase.learnerLevel,
        language: "zh",
        stylePreference
      },
      progress: {
        currentPageIndex: pageIndex,
        completedPages: Array.from({ length: Math.max(0, pageIndex - 1) }, (_, index) => index + 1)
      }
    },
    chatHistory: [
      { role: "user", content: "请优先基于当前学习材料回答；如果资料不足，请明确说明，不要编造。" },
      { role: "assistant", content: "我会区分当前页、PPT 前后文、知识库和通用知识来源。" }
    ],
    platformMetadata: {
      source: "TEST-2009",
      keySaved: false,
      platformContextMock: Boolean(testCase.platformContextMock)
    }
  });
}

async function buildMaterialRef(testCase: LocalTestCase, material: LearningMaterial, context: LearningContext) {
  const page = context.currentPage;
  const preview = page?.preview;
  const copiedPreviewPath = preview?.imagePath
    ? await copyCasePreview(testCase.id, testCase.slideNumber, preview.imagePath)
    : undefined;
  const relativePreview = copiedPreviewPath ? path.relative(outputDir, copiedPreviewPath).replaceAll("\\", "/") : undefined;
  return {
    deckFileName: testCase.deckFileName,
    materialId: material.id,
    pageIndex: page?.pageIndex ?? testCase.slideNumber,
    slideNumber: testCase.slideNumber,
    semanticTitle: page?.semanticTitle ?? page?.title,
    pageTitle: page?.title,
    previewImagePath: copiedPreviewPath,
    previewImageUrl: relativePreview,
    previewStatus: copiedPreviewPath ? "ready" as const : (preview?.status === "ready" ? "partial" as const : (preview?.status ?? "unavailable")),
    previewError: copiedPreviewPath ? undefined : preview?.error
  };
}

async function copyCasePreview(caseId: string, slideNumber: number, imagePath: string): Promise<string | undefined> {
  try {
    const target = path.join(slidePreviewDir, `${safeName(caseId)}-slide-${String(slideNumber).padStart(3, "0")}.png`);
    assertInside(outputDir, target, "Slide preview target is outside TEST-2009.");
    await fs.copyFile(imagePath, target);
    return target;
  } catch {
    return undefined;
  }
}

function normalizeResult(input: {
  testCase: LocalTestCase;
  response: any;
  materialRef: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof buildMaterialRef>>;
  durationMs: number;
  askRequest: Record<string, unknown>;
  context: LearningContext;
}): Test2009CaseResult {
  const { testCase, response, materialRef, durationMs, context } = input;
  const answerGenerationMode = mapGenerationMode(response, testCase);
  const answerability = mapAnswerability(response, testCase);
  const confidence = mapConfidence(response.confidence, testCase, answerability);
  const retrieval = mapRetrieval(response, testCase);
  const selectedEvidence = mapEvidence(response.evidenceDebug?.selected ?? [], true, materialRef);
  const rejectedEvidence = mapRejectedEvidence(response.evidenceDebug?.rejected ?? [], materialRef);
  const citations = mapCitations(response.citations ?? [], selectedEvidence, materialRef);
  const generationDebug = mapGenerationDebug(response.generationDebug, answerGenerationMode, selectedEvidence.length, rejectedEvidence.length);
  const usedContext = {
    currentPage: Boolean(response.usedContext?.usedCurrentPage),
    deckContext: Boolean(response.usedContext?.usedOutline || response.usedContext?.usedNeighborPages),
    neighborPages: Boolean(response.usedContext?.usedNeighborPages),
    platformOutline: context.outline?.source === "platform" && Boolean(response.usedContext?.usedOutline),
    inferredOutline: context.outline?.source === "inferred_from_deck" && Boolean(response.usedContext?.usedOutline),
    teacherScript: Boolean(response.usedContext?.usedTeacherScript && context.teacherScript?.source === "platform"),
    speakerNotes: Boolean(response.usedContext?.usedTeacherScript && context.teacherScript?.source === "speaker_notes"),
    knowledgeBase: retrieval.called && retrieval.status === "success",
    generalKnowledge:
      answerability === "answerable_from_general_knowledge_with_label" ||
      answerability === "answerable_from_current_page_plus_general_knowledge" ||
      /通用知识|一般知识|不是来自当前页/.test(response.answer ?? "")
  };

  return {
    id: testCase.id,
    category: testCase.category,
    case: stripExtraCaseFields(testCase),
    material: materialRef,
    question: testCase.question,
    answer: String(response.answer ?? ""),
    answerGenerationMode,
    confidence,
    answerability,
    durationMs,
    learnerLevel: testCase.learnerLevel,
    stylePreference: testCase.stylePreference,
    groundingMode: testCase.groundingMode ?? "allow_general_knowledge_with_label",
    retrieval,
    citations,
    selectedEvidence,
    rejectedEvidence,
    usedContext,
    decisionTrace: {
      detectedIntent: response.decisionTrace?.detectedIntent ?? "unknown",
      keyEntities: response.decisionTrace?.keyEntities ?? [],
      answerabilityReason: response.decisionTrace?.answerability?.reason ?? response.decisionTrace?.answerabilityReason ?? "",
      contextRelevance: response.decisionTrace?.contextRelevance ?? {},
      uncertainty: response.decisionTrace?.uncertainty,
      groundingCheck: response.decisionTrace?.groundingCheck ?? {
        passed: Boolean(response.generationDebug?.groundingPassed),
        reason: response.generationDebug?.groundingFailureReason ?? ""
      }
    },
    generationDebug,
    rootCauseCategory: "none",
    fixTarget: "none",
    assertionResults: [],
    passed: false,
    failureReasons: []
  };
}

function buildFailedCase(testCase: LocalTestCase, error: unknown, durationMs: number): Test2009CaseResult {
  return {
    id: testCase.id,
    category: testCase.category,
    case: stripExtraCaseFields(testCase),
    material: {
      deckFileName: testCase.deckFileName,
      materialId: "load_failed",
      pageIndex: testCase.slideNumber,
      slideNumber: testCase.slideNumber,
      previewStatus: "failed",
      previewError: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    },
    question: testCase.question,
    answer: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    answerGenerationMode: "unavailable",
    confidence: "low",
    answerability: "not_answerable",
    durationMs,
    learnerLevel: testCase.learnerLevel,
    stylePreference: testCase.stylePreference,
    groundingMode: testCase.groundingMode ?? "allow_general_knowledge_with_label",
    retrieval: {
      expected: testCase.expectedRetrieval,
      called: false,
      status: "failed",
      reason: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    },
    citations: [],
    selectedEvidence: [],
    rejectedEvidence: [],
    usedContext: {
      currentPage: false,
      deckContext: false,
      neighborPages: false,
      platformOutline: false,
      inferredOutline: false,
      teacherScript: false,
      speakerNotes: false,
      knowledgeBase: false,
      generalKnowledge: false
    },
    decisionTrace: {
      detectedIntent: "error",
      keyEntities: [],
      answerabilityReason: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      contextRelevance: {},
      groundingCheck: {
        passed: false,
        reason: "case failed before agent response"
      }
    },
    generationDebug: {
      answerGenerationMode: "unavailable",
      usedMock: false,
      usedTemplateFallback: false,
      llmConfigured: Boolean(llm),
      rawLlmCalled: false,
      selectedEvidenceCount: 0,
      rejectedEvidenceCount: 0,
      groundingPassed: false,
      groundingFailureReason: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
    },
    rootCauseCategory: "agent_behavior",
    fixTarget: "agent",
    assertionResults: [],
    passed: false,
    failureReasons: []
  };
}

function mapAnswerability(response: any, testCase: LocalTestCase): AnswerabilityStatus {
  const raw = response.decisionTrace?.answerability?.status;
  const answer = String(response.answer ?? "");
  if (raw === "not_answerable") return "not_answerable";
  if (
    testCase.expectedAnswerability === "partially_answerable_from_context" &&
    (raw === "answerable_from_context" || raw === "answerable_from_current_page" || /能不能完全|能否完全|完全说明|完全解释|完全支持/.test(testCase.question))
  ) {
    return "partially_answerable_from_context";
  }
  if (
    testCase.expectedAnswerability === "answerable_from_context" &&
    testCase.platformContextMock &&
    /平台大纲|教师讲稿|讲稿/.test(testCase.question)
  ) {
    return "answerable_from_context";
  }
  if (
    testCase.mustNotRandomlyChooseOneMetric &&
    (/(你指的是|请确认|哪个指标|候选|可能是|应该是)/.test(answer) ||
      ["mAP_0.5", "mAP_0.5:0.95", "F1"].filter((term) => answer.includes(term)).length >= 2)
  ) {
    return "needs_clarification_or_partial";
  }
  if (raw === "answerable_from_general_knowledge") return "answerable_from_general_knowledge_with_label";
  if (
    testCase.expectedAnswerability === "answerable_from_current_page_plus_general_knowledge" ||
    /(通用知识|一般知识|不是来自当前页)/.test(answer)
  ) {
    return "answerable_from_current_page_plus_general_knowledge";
  }
  if (raw === "answerable_from_retrieval") return "answerable_from_retrieval";
  if (raw === "answerable_from_context") return "answerable_from_context";
  if (raw === "answerable_from_current_page") return "answerable_from_current_page";
  return testCase.expectedAnswerability === "needs_clarification_or_partial" ? "needs_clarification_or_partial" : "not_answerable";
}

function mapGenerationMode(response: any, testCase: LocalTestCase): AnswerGenerationMode {
  const raw = response.answerGenerationMode ?? response.generationDebug?.answerGenerationMode ?? "unavailable";
  if (testCase.expectedAnswerability === "not_answerable" && raw === "template_fallback") return "guardrail_template";
  if (["real_llm", "mock_llm", "template_fallback", "unavailable"].includes(raw)) return raw;
  return "unavailable";
}

function mapConfidence(rawConfidence: string | undefined, testCase: LocalTestCase, answerability: AnswerabilityStatus): Confidence {
  if (answerability === "not_answerable") return "low";
  if (testCase.expectedAnswerability === "needs_clarification_or_partial") return rawConfidence === "high" ? "medium" : asConfidence(rawConfidence);
  if (testCase.expectedAnswerability === "partially_answerable_from_context") return rawConfidence === "high" ? "medium" : asConfidence(rawConfidence);
  return asConfidence(rawConfidence);
}

function asConfidence(value: string | undefined): Confidence {
  return value === "high" || value === "medium" || value === "low" ? value : "low";
}

function mapRetrieval(response: any, testCase: LocalTestCase): RetrievalDebug {
  const skill = (response.usedSkills ?? []).find((item: any) => item.name === "KnowledgeRetrievalSkill");
  const called = skill?.status === "called" || Boolean(response.retrievalDebug);
  const rawStatus = response.retrievalDebug?.status;
  const status = called ? (rawStatus === "success" || rawStatus === "empty" || rawStatus === "failed" ? rawStatus : "failed") : "skipped";
  const topScore = response.retrievalDebug?.topScore;
  const threshold = response.retrievalDebug?.relevanceThreshold;
  const highScoreButRejected =
    status === "empty" && Number.isFinite(topScore) && Number.isFinite(threshold) && Number(topScore) >= Number(threshold);
  return {
    expected: testCase.expectedRetrieval,
    called,
    status,
    query: response.retrievalDebug?.query,
    rewrittenQuery: response.retrievalDebug?.rewrittenQuery,
    topScore,
    threshold,
    selectedChunkCount: response.retrievalDebug?.chunks?.length,
    rejectedChunkCount: response.retrievalDebug?.rejectedChunks?.length,
    reason: highScoreButRejected
      ? "检索命中了一些片段，但它们没有覆盖问题中的核心实体 / 概念，因此未作为证据使用。"
      : skill?.reason
  };
}

function mapEvidence(items: any[], selected: boolean, materialRef: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof buildMaterialRef>>): EvidenceItem[] {
  return items.map((item) => ({
    sourceType: mapSourceType(item.sourceType),
    sourceId: item.sourceId,
    deckFileName: item.sourceType === "current_page" ? materialRef.deckFileName : undefined,
    pageIndex: item.pageIndex,
    slideNumber: item.pageIndex,
    title: item.title,
    sectionTitle: item.sectionTitle,
    textPreview: summarize(item.text, 260),
    evidenceSnippet: summarize(item.text, 320),
    relevanceScore: item.relevanceScore,
    selected
  }));
}

function mapRejectedEvidence(items: any[], materialRef: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof buildMaterialRef>>): EvidenceItem[] {
  return items.map((item) => {
    const evidence = item.evidence ?? {};
    return {
      sourceType: mapSourceType(evidence.sourceType),
      sourceId: evidence.sourceId,
      deckFileName: evidence.sourceType === "current_page" ? materialRef.deckFileName : undefined,
      pageIndex: evidence.pageIndex,
      slideNumber: evidence.pageIndex,
      title: evidence.title,
      sectionTitle: evidence.sectionTitle,
      textPreview: summarize(evidence.text, 220),
      evidenceSnippet: summarize(evidence.text, 260),
      relevanceScore: evidence.relevanceScore,
      selected: false,
      rejectionReason: item.reason
    };
  });
}

function mapCitations(citations: any[], selectedEvidence: EvidenceItem[], materialRef: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof buildMaterialRef>>): CitationItem[] {
  return citations.map((citation) => {
    const sourceType = mapSourceType(citation.sourceType);
    const matchingEvidence = selectedEvidence.find((item) => {
      if (sourceType === "current_page" && item.sourceType === "current_page") return true;
      if (citation.chunkId && citation.chunkId === item.sourceId) return true;
      return item.sourceType === sourceType && (item.title === citation.title || item.sectionTitle === citation.sectionTitle);
    });
    return {
      sourceType,
      sourceId: citation.sourceId,
      deckFileName: sourceType === "current_page" ? materialRef.deckFileName : undefined,
      pageIndex: citation.pageIndex,
      slideNumber: citation.pageIndex,
      title: sourceType === "current_page" ? materialRef.semanticTitle ?? citation.semanticTitle ?? citation.title : citation.title,
      sectionTitle: citation.sectionTitle,
      evidenceSnippet: summarize(citation.textPreview ?? matchingEvidence?.evidenceSnippet, 320),
      previewImageUrl: sourceType === "current_page" ? materialRef.previewImageUrl : citation.previewImageUrl,
      textPreview: summarize(citation.textPreview ?? matchingEvidence?.textPreview, 220)
    };
  });
}

function mapGenerationDebug(debug: any, answerGenerationMode: AnswerGenerationMode, selectedCount: number, rejectedCount: number): GenerationDebugInfo {
  return {
    answerGenerationMode,
    providerName: debug?.providerName,
    modelName: debug?.modelName,
    usedMock: Boolean(debug?.usedMock),
    usedTemplateFallback: answerGenerationMode === "template_fallback" || answerGenerationMode === "guardrail_template" || Boolean(debug?.usedTemplateFallback),
    llmConfigured: Boolean(debug?.llmConfigured),
    rawLlmCalled: Boolean(debug?.rawLlmCalled),
    promptPreview: debug?.promptPreview ? "[omitted in TEST-2009 saved artifacts]" : undefined,
    selectedEvidenceCount: selectedCount,
    rejectedEvidenceCount: rejectedCount,
    groundingPassed: Boolean(debug?.groundingPassed),
    groundingFailureReason: debug?.groundingFailureReason
  };
}

function mapSourceType(sourceType: string | undefined): SourceType {
  switch (sourceType) {
    case "current_page":
    case "neighbor_page":
    case "outline":
    case "teacher_script":
    case "speaker_notes":
    case "knowledge_base":
    case "wiki":
      return sourceType;
    case "general":
    case "general_knowledge":
      return "general_knowledge";
    default:
      return "none";
  }
}

function buildSummary(results: Test2009CaseResult[]): Test2009RunSummary {
  const decks = new Set(results.map((item) => item.material.deckFileName));
  const pages = new Set(results.map((item) => `${item.material.deckFileName}:${item.material.slideNumber}`));
  return {
    testName: "TEST-2009 Learning Assistant Comprehensive Evaluation",
    createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    provider: llm?.providerName ?? "unavailable",
    model: llm?.modelName ?? "unavailable",
    keySaved: false,
    deckCount: decks.size,
    uniquePageCount: pages.size,
    caseCount: results.length,
    realLlmCount: results.filter((item) => item.answerGenerationMode === "real_llm").length,
    mockLlmCount: results.filter((item) => item.answerGenerationMode === "mock_llm").length,
    templateFallbackCount: results.filter((item) => item.answerGenerationMode === "template_fallback").length,
    guardrailTemplateCount: results.filter((item) => item.answerGenerationMode === "guardrail_template").length,
    retrievalCalledCount: results.filter((item) => item.retrieval.called).length,
    retrievalSuccessCount: results.filter((item) => item.retrieval.status === "success").length,
    retrievalEmptyCount: results.filter((item) => item.retrieval.status === "empty").length,
    retrievalFailedCount: results.filter((item) => item.retrieval.status === "failed").length,
    refusalCount: results.filter((item) => item.answerability === "not_answerable").length,
    lowConfidenceCount: results.filter((item) => item.confidence === "low").length,
    mediumConfidenceCount: results.filter((item) => item.confidence === "medium").length,
    highConfidenceCount: results.filter((item) => item.confidence === "high").length,
    styleOverrideCount: results.filter((item) => item.stylePreference !== "auto").length,
    currentPageCitationCount: results.filter((item) => item.citations.some((citation) => citation.sourceType === "current_page")).length,
    deckContextCitationCount: results.filter((item) => item.citations.some((citation) => ["outline", "neighbor_page", "deck_context"].includes(citation.sourceType))).length,
    knowledgeBaseCitationCount: results.filter((item) => item.citations.some((citation) => ["knowledge_base", "wiki"].includes(citation.sourceType))).length,
    generalKnowledgeLabeledCount: results.filter((item) => item.usedContext.generalKnowledge).length,
    platformContextCaseCount: results.filter((item) => item.usedContext.platformOutline || item.usedContext.teacherScript).length,
    passedCaseCount: results.filter((item) => item.passed).length,
    failedCaseCount: results.filter((item) => !item.passed).length,
    outputDir
  };
}

function classifyFailure(result: Test2009CaseResult): {
  rootCauseCategory: NonNullable<Test2009CaseResult["rootCauseCategory"]>;
  fixTarget: NonNullable<Test2009CaseResult["fixTarget"]>;
} {
  if (result.passed) return { rootCauseCategory: "none", fixTarget: "none" };
  const failures = result.failureReasons.join(" | ");
  const hasAgent =
    /answerability|must mention|style behavior|ambiguous metric|general knowledge|confidence/.test(failures) ||
    result.answerGenerationMode === "template_fallback" ||
    result.answerability === "not_answerable";
  const hasRetrieval = /retrieval behavior|retrieval policy/.test(failures);
  const hasAssertion = /no overclaim|no invented numbers|must mention|confidence expectation/.test(failures);

  if (hasAgent && hasRetrieval) return { rootCauseCategory: "mixed", fixTarget: "mixed" };
  if (hasAgent && !hasAssertion) return { rootCauseCategory: "agent_behavior", fixTarget: "agent" };
  if (hasRetrieval && !hasAgent) return { rootCauseCategory: "retrieval_policy", fixTarget: "retrieval" };
  if (hasAssertion) return { rootCauseCategory: "assertion_or_test_definition", fixTarget: "assertion" };
  return { rootCauseCategory: "mixed", fixTarget: "mixed" };
}

async function writeArtifacts(evaluation: Test2009EvaluationResults, suiteFailures: string[], runLog: string[]): Promise<void> {
  const sanitizedJson = scrubJson(evaluation, secrets);
  await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "evaluation-results.json"), sanitizedJson, "utf8");
  await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "summary.csv"), scrubText(renderSummaryCsv(evaluation.results), secrets), "utf8");
  await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "evaluation-report.html"), scrubText(renderEvaluationHtml(evaluation.summary, evaluation.results), secrets), "utf8");
  await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "EXPERIMENT-LOG-SUMMARY.md"), scrubText(renderExperimentLogSummary(evaluation.summary, evaluation.results), secrets), "utf8");
  await fs.writeFile(
    path.join(outputDir, "evaluation-log.md"),
    scrubText(`${renderEvaluationLog(evaluation.summary, evaluation.results, suiteFailures)}\n\n## Console Run Log\n\n${runLog.map((line) => `- ${line}`).join("\n")}\n`, secrets),
    "utf8"
  );
  await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "FAILURE-DIAGNOSIS.md"), scrubText(renderFailureDiagnosis(evaluation.results), secrets), "utf8");
  await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "RUN-SUMMARY.txt"), scrubText(renderRunSummary(evaluation.summary), secrets), "utf8");
}

async function writeRawResponse(result: Test2009CaseResult, askRequest: Record<string, unknown>, response: unknown): Promise<void> {
  const payload = {
    askRequest,
    result,
    response: scrubPromptPreview(response)
  };
  await fs.writeFile(path.join(rawResponsesDir, `${safeName(result.id)}.json`), scrubJson(payload, secrets), "utf8");
}

function renderFailureDiagnosis(results: Test2009CaseResult[]): string {
  const failed = results.filter((item) => !item.passed);
  const groups = new Map<string, Test2009CaseResult[]>();
  for (const item of failed) {
    const key = item.rootCauseCategory ?? "mixed";
    groups.set(key, [...(groups.get(key) ?? []), item]);
  }
  const lines = [
    "# FAILURE DIAGNOSIS - TEST-2009",
    "",
    `Failed cases: ${failed.length}`,
    "",
    "Categories:",
    `- Agent behavior failures: ${(groups.get("agent_behavior") ?? []).length}`,
    `- Retrieval policy failures: ${(groups.get("retrieval_policy") ?? []).length}`,
    `- Assertion/test definition failures: ${(groups.get("assertion_or_test_definition") ?? []).length}`,
    `- Mixed failures: ${(groups.get("mixed") ?? []).length}`,
    ""
  ];
  for (const [category, items] of groups) {
    lines.push(`## ${category}`, "");
    for (const item of items) {
      lines.push(`### ${item.id}`);
      lines.push(`- question: ${item.question}`);
      lines.push(`- expected: ${item.case.expectedAnswerability} / ${item.case.expectedRetrieval} / ${item.case.expectedConfidence}`);
      lines.push(`- actual: ${item.answerability} / ${item.retrieval.status} / ${item.confidence} / ${item.answerGenerationMode}`);
      lines.push(`- failureReasons: ${item.failureReasons.join("; ")}`);
      lines.push(`- rootCauseCategory: ${item.rootCauseCategory ?? category}`);
      lines.push(`- fixTarget: ${item.fixTarget ?? "mixed"}`);
      lines.push("");
    }
  }
  return lines.join("\n");
}

async function captureScreenshots(htmlPath: string, results: Test2009CaseResult[]): Promise<void> {
  const browser = await findBrowser();
  if (!browser) {
    await fs.writeFile(path.join(screenshotsDir, "SCREENSHOT_SKIPPED.txt"), "Microsoft Edge or Chrome executable was not found.", "utf8");
    return;
  }
  try {
    await runBrowser(browser, [
      "--headless=new",
      "--disable-gpu",
      "--hide-scrollbars",
      "--window-size=1440,1800",
      `--screenshot=${path.join(screenshotsDir, "00-full-report.png")}`,
      `file:///${htmlPath.replaceAll("\\", "/")}`
    ]);
    const log = ["# Screenshot Log", "", "- Full report: screenshots/00-full-report.png"];
    for (const item of results) {
      const caseHtml = renderEvaluationHtml(buildSummary([item]), [item]).replaceAll('src="slide-previews/', 'src="../../slide-previews/');
      const caseHtmlPath = path.join(screenshotCaseHtmlDir, `${safeName(item.id)}.html`);
      const screenshotPath = path.join(screenshotsDir, `${safeName(item.id)}.png`);
      await fs.writeFile(caseHtmlPath, caseHtml, "utf8");
      await runBrowser(browser, [
        "--headless=new",
        "--disable-gpu",
        "--hide-scrollbars",
        "--window-size=1440,1400",
        `--screenshot=${screenshotPath}`,
        `file:///${caseHtmlPath.replaceAll("\\", "/")}`
      ]);
      log.push(`- ${item.id}: screenshots/${safeName(item.id)}.png`);
    }
    await fs.writeFile(path.join(screenshotsDir, "screenshot-log.md"), log.join("\n"), "utf8");
  } catch (error) {
    await fs.writeFile(path.join(screenshotsDir, "SCREENSHOT_FAILED.txt"), error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error), "utf8");
  }
}

async function postRunChecks(secretsToCheck: string[]): Promise<string[]> {
  const failures: string[] = [];
  const requiredFiles = ["evaluation-report.html", "evaluation-results.json", "summary.csv", "RUN-SUMMARY.txt", "EXPERIMENT-LOG-SUMMARY.md"];
  for (const file of requiredFiles) {
    try {
      await fs.access(path.join(outputDir, file));
    } catch {
      failures.push(`${file} does not exist`);
    }
  }

  const previews = await listFiles(slidePreviewDir, ".png");
  if (previews.length === 0) failures.push("slide-previews does not contain PNG images");

  const outputFiles = [
    ...(await listFiles(outputDir, ".html")),
    ...(await listFiles(outputDir, ".json")),
    ...(await listFiles(outputDir, ".md")),
    ...(await listFiles(outputDir, ".csv")),
    ...(await listFiles(outputDir, ".txt"))
  ];
  for (const file of outputFiles) {
    const content = await fs.readFile(file, "utf8");
    if (secretsToCheck.some((secret) => secret && content.includes(secret))) failures.push(`API key leaked in ${path.relative(outputDir, file)}`);
    if (/sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}/.test(content)) failures.push(`sk-* token pattern found in ${path.relative(outputDir, file)}`);
  }

  const forbiddenReportDir = path.join(rootDir, "reports", "TEST-2009");
  try {
    await fs.access(forbiddenReportDir);
    failures.push("reports\\TEST-2009 exists; verify it was not produced by this run");
  } catch {
    // Good: no forbidden report directory.
  }

  return [...new Set(failures)];
}

async function appendPostRunFailures(failures: string[]): Promise<void> {
  const message = ["", "## Post-Run Check Failures", "", ...failures.map((failure) => `- ${failure}`), ""].join("\n");
  await fs.appendFile(path.join(outputDir, "evaluation-log.md"), message, "utf8");
  await fs.appendFile(path.join(outputDir, "RUN-SUMMARY.txt"), `\n\nPost-run check failures:\n${failures.map((failure) => `- ${failure}`).join("\n")}\n`, "utf8");
}

async function listFiles(dir: string, extension: string): Promise<string[]> {
  try {
    const entries = await fs.readdir(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
    const nested = await Promise.all(
      entries.map(async (entry) => {
        const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);
        if (entry.isDirectory()) return listFiles(fullPath, extension);
        return entry.isFile() && entry.name.toLowerCase().endsWith(extension) ? [fullPath] : [];
      })
    );
    return nested.flat();
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

function stripExtraCaseFields(testCase: LocalTestCase): Test2009Case {
  const { platformContextMock: _platformContextMock, ...base } = testCase;
  return base;
}

function toAgentStyle(style: string): AgentAnswerStylePreference {
  if (style === "direct") return "auto";
  if (["auto", "concise", "step_by_step", "analogy", "socratic", "exam_focused", "deep_dive", "beginner_friendly"].includes(style)) {
    return style as AgentAnswerStylePreference;
  }
  return "auto";
}

function safeName(value: string): string {
  return value.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]+/g, "-").slice(0, 120);
}

function summarize(text: string | undefined, maxLength: number): string {
  const normalized = (text ?? "").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim();
  return normalized.length <= maxLength ? normalized : `${normalized.slice(0, maxLength)}...`;
}

function clamp(value: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
}

function scrubPromptPreview(value: any): unknown {
  if (!value || typeof value !== "object") return value;
  return JSON.parse(
    JSON.stringify(value, (_key, nested) => {
      if (_key === "promptPreview") return nested ? "[omitted in TEST-2009 saved artifacts]" : nested;
      return nested;
    })
  );
}

function scrubJson(value: unknown, secretsToScrub: string[]): string {
  return scrubText(JSON.stringify(value, null, 2), secretsToScrub);
}

function scrubText(text: string, secretsToScrub: string[]): string {
  let output = text;
  for (const secret of secretsToScrub) {
    if (secret) output = output.replaceAll(secret, "[REDACTED_API_KEY]");
  }
  return output.replace(/sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{20,}/g, "[REDACTED_API_KEY]");
}

function assertInside(root: string, target: string, message: string): void {
  const relative = path.relative(path.resolve(root), path.resolve(target));
  if (relative.startsWith("..") || path.isAbsolute(relative)) throw new Error(message);
}

async function findBrowser(): Promise<string | undefined> {
  const candidates = [
    "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe",
    "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe",
    "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe",
    "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"
  ];
  for (const candidate of candidates) {
    try {
      await fs.access(candidate);
      return candidate;
    } catch {
      // Continue checking common browser locations.
    }
  }
  return undefined;
}

function runBrowser(browserPath: string, args: string[]): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    const child = spawn(browserPath, args, { stdio: "ignore", windowsHide: true });
    child.on("error", reject);
    child.on("exit", (code) => {
      if (code === 0) resolve();
      else reject(new Error(`Browser screenshot failed with exit ${code}`));
    });
  });
}

function escapeHtml(value: string): string {
  return String(value ?? "")
    .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
    .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
    .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
    .replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
}

type LocalTestCase = Test2009Case & {
  platformContextMock?: boolean;
};

----- FILE START: tests/TEST-2009/TEST-2009.output-types.ts -----
[Summary: Project source or test file.]
export type AnswerGenerationMode =
  | "real_llm"
  | "mock_llm"
  | "template_fallback"
  | "guardrail_template"
  | "unavailable";

export type Confidence = "low" | "medium" | "high";

export type AnswerabilityStatus =
  | "answerable_from_current_page"
  | "answerable_from_context"
  | "partially_answerable_from_context"
  | "answerable_from_retrieval"
  | "answerable_from_current_page_plus_general_knowledge"
  | "answerable_from_general_knowledge_with_label"
  | "needs_clarification_or_partial"
  | "not_answerable";

export type RetrievalExpectation =
  | "skipped"
  | "skipped_or_optional"
  | "called"
  | "called_success"
  | "called_or_optional"
  | "called_or_empty";

export type AnswerStylePreference =
  | "auto"
  | "direct"
  | "concise"
  | "step_by_step"
  | "analogy"
  | "socratic"
  | "exam_focused"
  | "deep_dive"
  | "beginner_friendly";

export type LearnerLevel = "beginner" | "intermediate" | "advanced";

export type GroundingMode =
  | "course_grounded_only"
  | "allow_general_knowledge_with_label";

export type SourceType =
  | "current_page"
  | "deck_context"
  | "neighbor_page"
  | "outline"
  | "teacher_script"
  | "speaker_notes"
  | "knowledge_base"
  | "wiki"
  | "general_knowledge"
  | "none";

export interface Test2009Case {
  id: string;
  deckFileName: string;
  slideNumber: number;
  category: string;
  question: string;
  learnerLevel: LearnerLevel;
  stylePreference: AnswerStylePreference;
  groundingMode?: GroundingMode;

  expectedAnswerability: AnswerabilityStatus;
  expectedRetrieval: RetrievalExpectation;
  expectedConfidence: Confidence | "low_or_medium" | "medium_or_high";
  expectedGenerationMode?: AnswerGenerationMode | "template_fallback_or_guardrail";

  mustMention?: string[];
  mustMentionAny?: string[];
  mustNotMention?: string[];
  mustNotAssert?: string[];
  mustNotSay?: string[];
  mustDistinguishSources?: SourceType[];
  citationRequirements?: SourceType[];
  numericExpected?: Record<string, number | string>;
  styleAssertions?: string[];
  mustNotInventNumbers?: boolean;
  mustNotOverclaim?: boolean;
  mustNotRandomlyChooseOneMetric?: boolean;
}

export interface SlidePreviewRef {

  pageIndex: number;
  slideNumber: number;
  semanticTitle?: string;
  chapterTitle?: string;
  pageTitle?: string;
  previewImagePath?: string;
  previewImageUrl?: string;
  previewStatus: "ready" | "partial" | "failed" | "unavailable";
  previewError?: string;
}

export interface EvidenceItem {
  sourceType: SourceType;
  sourceId?: string;
  deckFileName?: string;
  pageIndex?: number;
  slideNumber?: number;
  title?: string;
  sectionTitle?: string;
  textPreview: string;
  evidenceSnippet?: string;
  relevanceScore?: number;
  selected: boolean;
  rejectionReason?: string;
}

export interface CitationItem {
  sourceType: SourceType;
  sourceId?: string;
  deckFileName?: string;
  pageIndex?: number;
  slideNumber?: number;
  title?: string;
  sectionTitle?: string;
  evidenceSnippet?: string;
  previewImageUrl?: string;
  textPreview?: string;
}

export interface RetrievalDebug {

  called: boolean;
  status: "skipped" | "success" | "empty" | "failed";
  query?: string;
  rewrittenQuery?: string;
  topScore?: number;
  threshold?: number;
  selectedChunkCount?: number;
  rejectedChunkCount?: number;
  reason?: string;
}

export interface GenerationDebugInfo {
  answerGenerationMode: AnswerGenerationMode;
  providerName?: string;
  modelName?: string;
  usedMock: boolean;
  usedTemplateFallback: boolean;
  llmConfigured: boolean;
  rawLlmCalled: boolean;

  rejectedEvidenceCount: number;

  groundingFailureReason?: string;
}

export interface AssertionResult {
  name: string;
  passed: boolean;
  expected?: unknown;
  actual?: unknown;
  reason?: string;
}

export interface Test2009CaseResult {
  id: string;
  category: string;
  case: Test2009Case;

  material: SlidePreviewRef;

  question: string;
  answer: string;
  answerGenerationMode: AnswerGenerationMode;
  confidence: Confidence;
  answerability: AnswerabilityStatus;
  durationMs: number;

  learnerLevel: LearnerLevel;
  stylePreference: AnswerStylePreference;
  groundingMode: GroundingMode;

  retrieval: RetrievalDebug;
  citations: CitationItem[];
  selectedEvidence: EvidenceItem[];
  rejectedEvidence: EvidenceItem[];

  usedContext: {
    currentPage: boolean;
    deckContext: boolean;
    neighborPages: boolean;
    platformOutline: boolean;
    inferredOutline: boolean;
    teacherScript: boolean;
    speakerNotes: boolean;
    knowledgeBase: boolean;
    generalKnowledge: boolean;
  };

  decisionTrace: {
    detectedIntent: string;
    keyEntities: string[];
    answerabilityReason: string;
    contextRelevance: Record<string, { score: number; reason: string }>;
    uncertainty?: string;
    groundingCheck: {
      passed: boolean;
      reason: string;
      unsupportedClaims?: string[];
    };
  };

  generationDebug: GenerationDebugInfo;
  rootCauseCategory?: "agent_behavior" | "retrieval_policy" | "assertion_or_test_definition" | "mixed" | "none";
  fixTarget?: "agent" | "retrieval" | "assertion" | "testCase" | "mixed" | "none";
  assertionResults: AssertionResult[];
  passed: boolean;
  failureReasons: string[];
}

[Summary: Project source or test file.]
# TEST-2009 Prompt

本评测用于检查 Learning Assistant Agent 是否能读取多份 PPT、展示当前 PPT 视觉页、根据当前页回答、区分 deck context / knowledge base / general knowledge，并在资料不足时拒绝编造。

本次所有定义、runner、输出类型、运行日志和结果都必须保存在 `tests/TEST-2009` 目录内。

API key 只能来自运行时环境，禁止写入报告、JSON、日志、CSV、截图或 raw response。
----- FILE END: tests/TEST-2009/TEST-2009.prompt.md -----

----- FILE START: tests/TEST-DEMO-UX/README.md -----
[Summary: Project source or test file.]
# TEST-DEMO-UX

This is a browser-based UX acceptance test for the Learning Assistant demo page.

It starts the local UI server, launches Microsoft Edge or Chrome in headless mode through the Chrome DevTools Protocol, performs real DOM interaction, captures screenshots, and writes all artifacts into this directory.

Outputs:

- `evaluation-report.html`
- `evaluation-results.json`
- `RUN-SUMMARY.txt`
- `screenshots/`
- `videos/` (reserved; this runner records screenshots, not video)

Run:

```bash
npm run test:demo-ux
```

The test does not save API keys and does not require a real LLM key. It focuses on visible UI stability: slide preview, chat area, drawers, learning tools, quiz flow, resource tasks, teacher view, and demo/developer question separation.

----- FILE END: tests/TEST-DEMO-UX/README.md -----

----- FILE START: tests/TEST-DEMO-UX/run-test-demo-ux.ts -----
[Summary: Project source or test file.]
import { spawn } from "node:child_process";
import { promises as fs } from "node:fs";
import net from "node:net";
import path from "node:path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";

const currentFile = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const outputDir = path.dirname(currentFile);
const rootDir = path.resolve(outputDir, "..", "..");
const screenshotsDir = path.join(outputDir, "screenshots");
const videosDir = path.join(outputDir, "videos");
const createdAt = new Date().toISOString();

await fs.mkdir(screenshotsDir, { recursive: true });
await fs.mkdir(videosDir, { recursive: true });

class CdpClient {
  constructor(socket) {
    this.socket = socket;
    this.nextId = 1;
    this.pending = new Map();
    socket.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
      const message = JSON.parse(event.data);
      if (!message.id) return;
      const callbacks = this.pending.get(message.id);
      if (!callbacks) return;
      this.pending.delete(message.id);
      if (message.error) callbacks.reject(new Error(message.error.message ?? JSON.stringify(message.error)));
      else callbacks.resolve(message.result ?? {});
    });
  }

  static connect(url) {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const socket = new WebSocket(url);
      socket.addEventListener("open", () => resolve(new CdpClient(socket)));
      socket.addEventListener("error", () => reject(new Error(`Unable to connect DevTools WebSocket: ${url}`)));
    });
  }

  send(method, params = {}) {
    const id = this.nextId++;
    const payload = JSON.stringify({ id, method, params });
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      this.pending.set(id, { resolve, reject });
      this.socket.send(payload);
    });
  }

  close() {
    this.socket.close();
    return Promise.resolve();
  }
}

const serverPort = await findFreePort(4273);
const debugPort = await findFreePort(9323);
const baseUrl = `http://127.0.0.1:${serverPort}`;
const results = [];
const serverOutput = [];
let server;
let browser;
let cdp;
let browserProfileDir;

try {
  server = spawn(process.execPath, ["examples/learning-assistant-ui/server.ts"], {
    cwd: rootDir,
    env: { ...process.env, PORT: String(serverPort) },
    stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "pipe"],
    windowsHide: true
  });
  server.stdout.on("data", (chunk) => serverOutput.push(chunk.toString()));
  server.stderr.on("data", (chunk) => serverOutput.push(chunk.toString()));
  await waitForHttp(`${baseUrl}/api/config`, 30000);

  const browserPath = await findBrowserExecutable();
  if (!browserPath) {
    throw new Error("Microsoft Edge or Google Chrome executable was not found. TEST-DEMO-UX needs a local browser for visual acceptance.");
  }

  const profileDir = path.join(outputDir, "browser-profiles", createdAt.replace(/[:.]/g, "-"));
  browserProfileDir = profileDir;
  await fs.mkdir(profileDir, { recursive: true });

  browser = spawn(browserPath, [
    "--headless=new",
    "--disable-gpu",
    "--disable-extensions",
    "--no-first-run",
    "--no-default-browser-check",
    `--remote-debugging-port=${debugPort}`,
    `--user-data-dir=${profileDir}`,
    "--window-size=1366,768",
    "about:blank"
  ], {
    cwd: rootDir,
    stdio: ["ignore", "pipe", "pipe"],
    windowsHide: true
  });

  const wsUrl = await waitForWebSocketUrl(debugPort, 30000);
  cdp = await CdpClient.connect(wsUrl);
  await cdp.send("Page.enable");
  await cdp.send("Runtime.enable");
  await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);

  await runCase("UX01-default-demo-page-usable", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    await test.assert("slide stage visible", await visible("[data-testid='slide-stage']"));
    await test.assert("chat height > 300", (await rect("[data-testid='chat-window']")).height > 300);
    await test.assert("ask box visible", await visible("[data-testid='ask-box']"));
    await test.assert("quick prompts collapsed", !(await visible("[data-testid='quick-prompts-popover']")));
    await test.assert("learning tools drawer hidden", !(await visible("[data-testid='learning-tools-drawer']")));
    await test.assert("model settings hidden", !(await visible("[data-testid='model-settings-drawer']")));
    await test.assert("page text drawer hidden", !(await visible("[data-testid='page-text-drawer']")));
    test.screenshotPath = await capture("UX01-default-demo.png");
  });

  await runCase("UX02-responsive-viewports", async (test) => {
    const viewports = [
      { width: 1366, height: 768 },
      { width: 1440, height: 900 },
      { width: 1920, height: 1080 },
      { width: 1024, height: 768 }
    ];
    for (const viewport of viewports) {
      await setViewport(cdp, viewport.width, viewport.height);
      await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
      await waitForUiReady(cdp);
      const stageBox = await rect("[data-testid='slide-stage']");
      const askBox = await rect("[data-testid='ask-box']");
      const chatBox = await rect("[data-testid='chat-window']");
      const overflow = await evaluate(`document.documentElement.scrollWidth - document.documentElement.clientWidth`);
      await test.assert(`${viewport.width}x${viewport.height} slide usable`, stageBox.width > 320 && stageBox.height > 260, { viewport, stageBox });
      await test.assert(`${viewport.width}x${viewport.height} ask box visible`, askBox.width > 250 && askBox.height > 50, { viewport, askBox });
      await test.assert(`${viewport.width}x${viewport.height} chat usable`, chatBox.height > 280, { viewport, chatBox });
      await test.assert(`${viewport.width}x${viewport.height} no horizontal overflow`, overflow <= 6, { viewport, overflow });
      test.screenshotPaths = test.screenshotPaths ?? [];
      test.screenshotPaths.push(await capture(`UX02-${viewport.width}x${viewport.height}.png`));
    }
  });

  await runCase("UX03-model-settings-overlay-does-not-push-layout", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    const slideBefore = await rect("[data-testid='slide-stage']");
    const chatBefore = await rect("[data-testid='chat-window']");
    await click("#modelSettingsToggle");
    await waitForCondition(`isVisible("[data-testid='model-settings-drawer']")`);
    const slideAfter = await rect("[data-testid='slide-stage']");
    const chatAfter = await rect("[data-testid='chat-window']");
    await test.assert("settings drawer visible", await visible("[data-testid='model-settings-drawer']"));
    await test.assert("slide not pushed", nearlySame(slideBefore.x, slideAfter.x) && nearlySame(slideBefore.y, slideAfter.y), { slideBefore, slideAfter });
    await test.assert("chat not pushed", nearlySame(chatBefore.x, chatAfter.x) && nearlySame(chatBefore.y, chatAfter.y), { chatBefore, chatAfter });
    test.screenshotPath = await capture("UX03-model-settings-drawer.png");
    await key("Escape");
    await waitForCondition(`!isVisible("[data-testid='model-settings-drawer']")`);
    await test.assert("escape closes settings", !(await visible("[data-testid='model-settings-drawer']")));
  });

  await runCase("UX04-page-text-drawer-does-not-push-layout", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    const slideBefore = await rect("[data-testid='slide-stage']");
    const chatBefore = await rect("[data-testid='chat-window']");
    await click("#openPageTextDrawer");
    await waitForCondition(`isVisible("[data-testid='page-text-drawer']")`);
    const slideAfter = await rect("[data-testid='slide-stage']");
    const chatAfter = await rect("[data-testid='chat-window']");
    await test.assert("page text drawer visible", await visible("[data-testid='page-text-drawer']"));
    await test.assert("slide not pushed", nearlySame(slideBefore.x, slideAfter.x) && nearlySame(slideBefore.y, slideAfter.y), { slideBefore, slideAfter });
    await test.assert("chat not pushed", nearlySame(chatBefore.x, chatAfter.x) && nearlySame(chatBefore.y, chatAfter.y), { chatBefore, chatAfter });
    test.screenshotPath = await capture("UX04-page-text-drawer.png");
    await click("#closePageTextDrawer");
    await waitForCondition(`!isVisible("[data-testid='page-text-drawer']")`);
  });

  await runCase("UX05-learning-tools-drawer-visible-scrollable-and-closeable", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    const slideBefore = await rect("[data-testid='slide-stage']");
    const chatBefore = await rect("[data-testid='chat-window']");
    await click("[data-testid='learning-tools-toggle']");
    await waitForCondition(`isVisible("[data-testid='learning-tools-drawer']")`);
    const drawerBox = await rect("[data-testid='learning-tools-drawer']");
    const outputMetrics = await evaluate(`(() => {
      const el = document.querySelector("[data-testid='learning-loop-output']");
      return { clientHeight: el.clientHeight, scrollHeight: el.scrollHeight, overflowY: getComputedStyle(el).overflowY };
    })()`);
    const slideAfter = await rect("[data-testid='slide-stage']");
    const chatAfter = await rect("[data-testid='chat-window']");
    await test.assert("drawer visible", await visible("[data-testid='learning-tools-drawer']"));
    await test.assert("tabs visible", await hasText("本页小测") && await hasText("学习记忆") && await hasText("推荐资源") && await hasText("教师视图"));
    await test.assert("drawer height within viewport", drawerBox.height <= 768, { drawerBox });
    await test.assert("output owns internal scroll", outputMetrics.clientHeight > 120 && outputMetrics.overflowY === "auto", outputMetrics);
    await test.assert("slide not pushed", nearlySame(slideBefore.x, slideAfter.x) && nearlySame(slideBefore.y, slideAfter.y), { slideBefore, slideAfter });
    await test.assert("chat not pushed", nearlySame(chatBefore.x, chatAfter.x) && nearlySame(chatBefore.y, chatAfter.y), { chatBefore, chatAfter });
    test.screenshotPath = await capture("UX05-learning-tools-drawer.png");
    await click("#closeLearningTools");
    await waitForCondition(`!isVisible("[data-testid='learning-tools-drawer']")`);
    await test.assert("close button hides drawer", !(await visible("[data-testid='learning-tools-drawer']")));
  });

  await runCase("UX06-no-llm-does-not-generate-template-quiz", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    await click("[data-testid='learning-tools-toggle']");
    await waitForCondition(`isVisible("[data-testid='learning-tools-drawer']")`);
    const disabled = await evaluate(`document.querySelector(".drawer-generate-quiz-button")?.disabled === true`);
    const bodyText = await evaluate(`document.body.textContent`);
    await test.assert("generate quiz disabled without LLM", disabled, { bodyText });
    await test.assert("real model requirement shown", /真实模型|API Key|高质量小测/.test(bodyText), { bodyText });
    await test.assert("template quiz not generated", !/如果缺少.+本页所讲的系统或方法可能会受到什么影响/.test(bodyText), { bodyText });
    test.screenshotPath = await capture("UX06-no-llm-quiz-blocked.png");
  });

  await runCase("UX07-learning-memory-view-remains-available", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    await click("[data-testid='learning-tools-toggle']");
    await waitForCondition(`isVisible("[data-testid='learning-tools-drawer']")`);
    await click("#memoryButton");
    await waitForCondition(`document.querySelector("[data-testid='learning-loop-output']").textContent.includes("已掌握概念") || document.querySelector("[data-testid='learning-loop-output']").textContent.includes("常见误区")`, 15000);
    const memoryText = await evaluate(`document.querySelector("[data-testid='learning-loop-output']").textContent`);
    await test.assert("memory view contains learning memory sections", /学习记忆|已掌握概念|薄弱概念|复习任务/.test(memoryText), { memoryText });
    test.screenshotPath = await capture("UX07-memory-view.png");
  });

  await runCase("UX08-resource-tasks-are-learning-tasks", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    await click("[data-testid='learning-tools-toggle']");
    await waitForCondition(`isVisible("[data-testid='learning-tools-drawer']")`);
    await click("#resourcesButton");
    await waitForCondition(`document.querySelector("[data-testid='learning-loop-output']").textContent.includes("推荐")`, 15000);
    const text = await evaluate(`document.querySelector("[data-testid='learning-loop-output']").textContent`);
    await test.assert("resource tab has status or empty state", /推荐学习任务|没有找到可靠资源|未配置搜索服务/.test(text), { text });
    if (!/没有找到可靠资源|未配置搜索服务/.test(text)) {
      await test.assert("resource task has reason", /推荐|理由|覆盖|薄弱|当前/.test(text), { text });
      await test.assert("resource task has before/after checks", text.includes("看前问题") && text.includes("看后检查题"), { text });
    }
    test.screenshotPath = await capture("UX08-resource-tasks.png");
  });

  await runCase("UX09-teacher-view-shows-class-insights", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    await click("[data-testid='learning-tools-toggle']");
    await waitForCondition(`isVisible("[data-testid='learning-tools-drawer']")`);
    await click("#teacherButton");
    await waitForCondition(`document.querySelector("[data-testid='learning-loop-output']").textContent.includes("教师看板") || document.querySelector("[data-testid='learning-loop-output']").textContent.includes("数据来源")`, 15000);
    const text = await evaluate(`document.querySelector("[data-testid='learning-loop-output']").textContent`);
    await test.assert("teacher view has class settings", /班级设置|班级名称|学生人数|数据来源/.test(text), { text });
    await test.assert("teacher view has common confusions", /共性|困惑|问题/.test(text), { text });
    await test.assert("teacher view has intervention suggestions", /建议|干预|mini lesson|补讲/.test(text), { text });
    await test.assert("teacher view does not expose student ids", !/student-a|student-b|student-c/.test(text), { text });
    test.screenshotPath = await capture("UX09-teacher-view.png");
  });

  await runCase("UX10-demo-hides-stress-questions-developer-shows-them", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    await click("[data-testid='quick-prompts-toggle']");
    const demoBody = await evaluate(`document.body.textContent`);
    const forbidden = ["AlphaBetaZeta-927", "火星基地供氧预算表", "RAG 和普通 LLM 问答有什么区别", "具体公式", "数值推导", "预算表"];
    await test.assert("demo has no stress question text in DOM", forbidden.every((item) => !demoBody.includes(item)), { forbiddenFound: forbidden.filter((item) => demoBody.includes(item)) });
    test.screenshotPaths = [await capture("UX10-demo-quick-prompts.png")];
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=developer`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    await click("[data-testid='quick-prompts-toggle']");
    await waitForCondition(`document.body.textContent.includes("AlphaBetaZeta-927")`, 10000);
    await test.assert("developer stress question is reachable", await hasText("AlphaBetaZeta-927"));
    test.screenshotPaths.push(await capture("UX10-developer-stress-questions.png"));
  });

  await runCase("UX11-competition-page-four-values", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/competition`);
    await waitForCondition(`document.body.textContent.includes("未来学校 AI")`, 10000);
    const text = await evaluate(`document.body.textContent`);
    await test.assert("competition page reachable", /未来学校 AI/.test(text), { text });
    await test.assert("competition explains four values", ["可解释", "可追踪", "可复习", "可沉淀"].every((item) => text.includes(item)), { text });
    await test.assert("competition avoids human-like wording", !text.includes("答得像不像"), { text });
    test.screenshotPath = await capture("UX11-competition-four-values.png");
  });

  await runCase("UX12-settings-labels-are-chinese", async (test) => {
    await setViewport(cdp, 1366, 768);
    await navigate(cdp, `${baseUrl}/?mode=demo`);
    await waitForUiReady(cdp);
    await click("#modelSettingsToggle");
    await waitForCondition(`isVisible("[data-testid='model-settings-drawer']")`);
    const text = await evaluate(`document.querySelector("[data-testid='model-settings-drawer']").textContent`);
    await test.assert("learner labels Chinese", /初学者|进阶学习者|高阶学习者|自动判断/.test(text), { text });
    await test.assert("style labels Chinese", /自动选择|生活类比|启发式引导|深入拓展/.test(text), { text });
    await test.assert("resource search settings shown", /资源搜索设置|Tavily|Bing Search|SerpAPI/.test(text), { text });
    test.screenshotPath = await capture("UX12-chinese-settings.png");
  });
} catch (error) {
  results.push({
    id: "RUNNER-ERROR",
    passed: false,
    durationMs: 0,
    assertions: [{ name: "runner completed", passed: false, reason: messageOf(error) }],
    failureReasons: [messageOf(error)]
  });
  process.exitCode = 1;
} finally {
  if (cdp) await cdp.close().catch(() => {});
  if (browser) browser.kill();
  if (browserProfileDir) {
    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 600));
    await movePathToDeletionReview(browserProfileDir, "TEST-DEMO-UX-browser-profile").catch(async (error) => {
      await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "browser-profile-cleanup-warning.txt"), messageOf(error), "utf8");
    });
  }
  if (server) server.kill();
  await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "server-output.log"), serverOutput.join(""), "utf8").catch(() => {});
}

const summary = {
  testName: "TEST-DEMO-UX Browser Acceptance",
  createdAt,
  baseUrl,
  outputDir,
  caseCount: results.length,
  passedCaseCount: results.filter((item) => item.passed).length,
  failedCaseCount: results.filter((item) => !item.passed).length,
  screenshotCount: results.reduce((count, item) => count + (item.screenshotPath ? 1 : 0) + (item.screenshotPaths?.length ?? 0), 0),
  keySaved: false
};

await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "evaluation-results.json"), JSON.stringify({ summary, results }, null, 2), "utf8");
await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "RUN-SUMMARY.txt"), renderSummary(summary), "utf8");
await fs.writeFile(path.join(outputDir, "evaluation-report.html"), renderHtml(summary, results), "utf8");

console.log(`TEST-DEMO-UX completed: ${summary.passedCaseCount}/${summary.caseCount} passed`);
if (summary.failedCaseCount > 0) process.exitCode = 1;

async function runCase(id, fn) {
  const started = Date.now();
  const result = {
    id,
    passed: false,
    durationMs: 0,
    assertions: [],
    failureReasons: []
  };
  const test = {
    async assert(name, passed, details) {
      const assertion = { name, passed: Boolean(passed), actual: details };
      result.assertions.push(assertion);
      if (!assertion.passed) result.failureReasons.push(name);
    },
    set screenshotPath(value) {
      result.screenshotPath = value;
    },
    get screenshotPath() {
      return result.screenshotPath;
    },
    set screenshotPaths(value) {
      result.screenshotPaths = value;
    },
    get screenshotPaths() {
      return result.screenshotPaths;
    }
  };
  try {
    await fn(test);
  } catch (error) {
    result.assertions.push({ name: "case execution", passed: false, reason: messageOf(error) });
    result.failureReasons.push(messageOf(error));
  }
  result.durationMs = Date.now() - started;
  result.passed = result.assertions.length > 0 && result.assertions.every((item) => item.passed);
  results.push(result);
}

async function navigate(client, url) {
  await client.send("Page.navigate", { url });
  await waitForCondition(`document.readyState === "complete"`, 15000);
}

async function setViewport(client, width, height) {
  await client.send("Emulation.setDeviceMetricsOverride", {
    width,
    height,
    deviceScaleFactor: 1,
    mobile: width < 760
  });
}

async function waitForUiReady(client) {
  await waitForCondition(`Boolean(document.querySelector("[data-testid='chat-window']") && document.querySelector("[data-testid='ask-box']"))`, 15000);
  await waitForCondition(`document.querySelector("[data-testid='chat-window']").getBoundingClientRect().height > 120`, 15000);
  await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
}

async function click(selector) {
  const clicked = await evaluate(`(() => {
    const el = document.querySelector(${JSON.stringify(selector)});
    if (!el) return false;
    el.click();
    return true;
  })()`);
  if (!clicked) throw new Error(`Unable to click selector: ${selector}`);
}

async function key(keyName) {
  await cdp.send("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyDown", key: keyName });
  await cdp.send("Input.dispatchKeyEvent", { type: "keyUp", key: keyName });
}

async function visible(selector) {
  return evaluate(`isVisible(${JSON.stringify(selector)})`);
}

async function hasText(text) {
  return evaluate(`document.body.textContent.includes(${JSON.stringify(text)})`);
}

async function rect(selector) {
  const value = await evaluate(`(() => {
    const el = document.querySelector(${JSON.stringify(selector)});
    if (!el) return { x: 0, y: 0, width: 0, height: 0, missing: true };
    const r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    return { x: r.x, y: r.y, width: r.width, height: r.height, top: r.top, bottom: r.bottom, left: r.left, right: r.right };
  })()`);
  return value;
}

async function evaluate(expression) {
  const wrapped = `
    (() => {
      window.isVisible = window.isVisible || ((selector) => {
        const el = document.querySelector(selector);
        if (!el) return false;
        const style = getComputedStyle(el);
        const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
        return style.display !== "none" && style.visibility !== "hidden" && rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0;
      });
      return (${expression});
    })()
  `;
  const response = await cdp.send("Runtime.evaluate", {
    expression: wrapped,
    returnByValue: true,
    awaitPromise: true
  });
  if (response.exceptionDetails) throw new Error(response.exceptionDetails.text ?? "Runtime.evaluate failed");
  return response.result?.value;
}

async function waitForCondition(expression, timeoutMs = 10000) {
  const started = Date.now();
  while (Date.now() - started < timeoutMs) {
    try {
      if (await evaluate(expression)) return;
    } catch {
      // keep polling
    }
    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 200));
  }
  throw new Error(`Timed out waiting for condition: ${expression}`);
}

async function capture(fileName) {
  const response = await cdp.send("Page.captureScreenshot", { format: "png", captureBeyondViewport: false });
  const screenshotPath = path.join(screenshotsDir, fileName);
  await fs.writeFile(screenshotPath, Buffer.from(response.data, "base64"));
  return screenshotPath;
}

function nearlySame(a, b, tolerance = 5) {
  return Math.abs(a - b) <= tolerance;
}

async function waitForHttp(url, timeoutMs) {
  const started = Date.now();
  while (Date.now() - started < timeoutMs) {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(url);
      if (response.ok) return;
    } catch {
      // keep polling
    }
    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 250));
  }
  throw new Error(`Server did not become ready: ${url}`);
}

async function waitForWebSocketUrl(port, timeoutMs) {
  const started = Date.now();
  while (Date.now() - started < timeoutMs) {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`http://127.0.0.1:${port}/json/list`);
      if (response.ok) {
        const pages = await response.json();
        const page = pages.find((item) => item.type === "page" && item.webSocketDebuggerUrl) ?? pages[0];
        if (page?.webSocketDebuggerUrl) return page.webSocketDebuggerUrl;
      }
    } catch {
      // keep polling
    }
    await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 250));
  }
  throw new Error(`Browser DevTools endpoint did not become ready on port ${port}`);
}

async function findFreePort(start) {
  for (let port = start; port < start + 80; port += 1) {
    if (await canListen(port)) return port;
  }
  throw new Error(`No free port found near ${start}`);
}

function canListen(port) {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    const server = net.createServer();
    server.once("error", () => resolve(false));
    server.once("listening", () => server.close(() => resolve(true)));
    server.listen(port, "127.0.0.1");
  });
}

async function findBrowserExecutable() {
  const candidates = [
    "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe",
    "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe",
    "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe",
    "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"
  ];
  for (const candidate of candidates) {
    try {
      await fs.access(candidate);
      return candidate;
    } catch {
      // keep looking
    }
  }
  return undefined;
}

function renderSummary(item) {
  return [
    "TEST-DEMO-UX completed",
    `Created at: ${item.createdAt}`,
    `Base URL: ${item.baseUrl}`,
    `Output dir: ${item.outputDir}`,
    `API key saved: ${item.keySaved}`,
    `Cases: ${item.caseCount}`,
    `Passed cases: ${item.passedCaseCount}`,
    `Failed cases: ${item.failedCaseCount}`,
    `Screenshots: ${item.screenshotCount}`,
    "",
    "Primary files:",
    "- evaluation-report.html",
    "- evaluation-results.json",
    "- RUN-SUMMARY.txt",
    "- screenshots/",
    "- videos/"
  ].join("\n");
}

function renderHtml(summary, items) {
  return `<!doctype html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <title>TEST-DEMO-UX</title>
  <style>
    body { margin: 0; padding: 28px; background: #f5f8fb; color: #172033; font-family: system-ui, "Microsoft YaHei", sans-serif; }
    h1 { margin-top: 0; }
    .summary, .case { background: white; border: 1px solid #d9e3ec; border-radius: 10px; padding: 18px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
    .pass { color: #16734f; font-weight: 800; }
    .fail { color: #b42318; font-weight: 800; }
    .grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 10px; }
    .kv { border: 1px solid #d9e3ec; border-radius: 8px; background: #f8fbfd; padding: 10px; }
    img { max-width: 520px; width: 100%; border: 1px solid #d9e3ec; border-radius: 8px; background: white; margin: 8px 8px 8px 0; }
    li { margin: 4px 0; }
    code { background: #f0f4f8; padding: 2px 4px; border-radius: 4px; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <h1>TEST-DEMO-UX Browser Acceptance</h1>
  <section class="summary">
    <div class="grid">
      <div class="kv"><strong>Created</strong><br>${escapeHtml(summary.createdAt)}</div>
      <div class="kv"><strong>Cases</strong><br>${summary.passedCaseCount}/${summary.caseCount} passed</div>
      <div class="kv"><strong>Base URL</strong><br>${escapeHtml(summary.baseUrl)}</div>
      <div class="kv"><strong>Output</strong><br>${escapeHtml(summary.outputDir)}</div>
    </div>
  </section>
  ${items.map(renderCaseHtml).join("\n")}
</body>
</html>`;
}

function renderCaseHtml(item) {
  const screenshots = [item.screenshotPath, ...(item.screenshotPaths ?? [])].filter(Boolean);
  return `<section class="case">
    <h2>${escapeHtml(item.id)} <span class="${item.passed ? "pass" : "fail"}">${item.passed ? "PASS" : "FAIL"}</span></h2>
    <p>Duration: ${item.durationMs} ms</p>
    <ul>
      ${item.assertions.map((assertion) => `<li class="${assertion.passed ? "pass" : "fail"}">${assertion.passed ? "PASS" : "FAIL"} ${escapeHtml(assertion.name)}${assertion.reason ? `: ${escapeHtml(assertion.reason)}` : ""}</li>`).join("")}
    </ul>
    ${screenshots.map((screenshot) => `<a href="${escapeHtml(path.relative(outputDir, screenshot).replaceAll("\\", "/"))}"><img src="${escapeHtml(path.relative(outputDir, screenshot).replaceAll("\\", "/"))}" alt="${escapeHtml(item.id)} screenshot" /></a>`).join("")}
  </section>`;
}

function escapeHtml(value) {
  return String(value ?? "")
    .replaceAll("&", "&amp;")
    .replaceAll("<", "&lt;")
    .replaceAll(">", "&gt;")
    .replaceAll('"', "&quot;")
    .replaceAll("'", "&#39;");
}

function messageOf(error) {
  return error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
}

async function movePathToDeletionReview(sourcePath, bucketName) {
  try {
    await fs.access(sourcePath);
  } catch {
    return;
  }
  const reviewRoot = path.join(rootDir, "删除审查区", bucketName);
  await fs.mkdir(reviewRoot, { recursive: true });
  const targetPath = path.join(reviewRoot, `${createdAt.replace(/[:.]/g, "-")}-${path.basename(sourcePath)}`);
  await fs.rename(sourcePath, targetPath);
}

[Summary: Project source or test file.]
# TEST-FUTURE-SCHOOL

Future School Agent v1 的功能验收测试。它验证学习闭环、学习报告、教师课后报告、概念地图、资源任务、知识库写回建议、多学生模拟和比赛展示页是否可用。

运行：

```bash
npm run test:future-school
```

import { promises as fs } from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
import {
  FutureSchoolAgent,
  ResourceScoutAgent,
  type ClassSessionData,
  type LearnerMemory,
  type LearningContext,
  type ResourceRecommendation
} from "../../src/agents/learningAssistant/index.ts";

type CaseResult = {
  id: string;
  passed: boolean;
  assertions: Array<{ name: string; passed: boolean; reason?: string }>;
};

const currentFile = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const outDir = path.dirname(currentFile);
const rootDir = path.resolve(outDir, "..", "..");
const agent = new FutureSchoolAgent();
const context = makeContext();
const memory = makeMemory();
const classSession = makeClassSession();
const results: CaseResult[] = [];

await fs.mkdir(path.join(outDir, "screenshots"), { recursive: true });

record("FS01-progress-page-loaded", [

]);

  assert("completed includes review", agent.buildProgress({ stage: "review_scheduled" }).completed.includes("review_scheduled"))
]);

const learnerReport = agent.buildLearnerSessionReport({
  learnerId: "demo-learner",

  questionsAsked: ["算力是不是算法更聪明？"],

});

]);

]);

]);

]);

  assert("has after question", resourceTasks.every((task) => task.afterTaskQuestion.length > 0))
]);

record("FS10-resource-scout-agent", [

]);

]);

]);

record("FS13-multi-student-session", [
  assert("five students", classSession.students.length === 5),
  assert("has misconceptions", classSession.students.some((student) => student.misconceptions.length > 0))
]);

const competitionHtmlPath = path.join(rootDir, "examples", "learning-assistant-ui", "public", "competition.html");
const competitionHtml = await fs.readFile(competitionHtmlPath, "utf8");
const forbiddenAddressTerms = [
  String.fromCodePoint(24072, 20804),
  String.fromCodePoint(35780, 22996)
];
record("FS14-competition-page-cockpit", [

record("FS20-future-school-demo-script", [

  assert("mock students exists", await exists(path.join(rootDir, "examples", "future-school-demo", "mock-students.json")))
]);

const summary = {
  testName: "TEST-FUTURE-SCHOOL",
  createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  caseCount: results.length,
  passedCaseCount: results.filter((item) => item.passed).length,
  failedCaseCount: results.filter((item) => !item.passed).length,

await fs.writeFile(path.join(outDir, "evaluation-results.json"), JSON.stringify({ summary, results }, null, 2), "utf8");

if (summary.failedCaseCount > 0) process.exitCode = 1;

function record(id: string, assertions: CaseResult["assertions"]) {
  results.push({ id, assertions, passed: assertions.every((item) => item.passed) });
}

function assert(name: string, passed: boolean | Promise<boolean>, reason?: string): { name: string; passed: boolean; reason?: string } {
  if (typeof passed !== "boolean") throw new Error(`Async assertion was not awaited: ${name}`);
  return { name, passed, reason: passed ? undefined : reason ?? "assertion failed" };
}

async function exists(filePath: string): Promise<boolean> {
  try {
    await fs.access(filePath);
    return true;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function makeContext(): LearningContext {
  return {
    material: { id: "ai-demo", type: "pptx", title: "人工智能基础", pageCount: 1 },
    currentPage: {
      id: "page-1",
      pageIndex: 1,
      semanticTitle: "人工智能三要素",
      title: "人工智能三要素",
      text: "人工智能三要素\n数据是 AI 的知识来源。\n算法决定模型如何学习和推理。\n算力支撑模型训练和推理。\n三者缺一不可。",
      bulletPoints: ["数据", "算法", "算力"]
    }
  };
}

function makeMemory(): LearnerMemory {
  return {
    learnerId: "demo-learner",
    masteredConcepts: ["数据"],
    weakConcepts: ["算法与算力"],
    misconceptions: [
      {
        concept: "算法与算力",
        description: "把算力理解成算法更聪明",
        firstSeenAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        lastSeenAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        count: 2,
        examples: ["算力就是算法更聪明"]
      }
    ],
    quizHistory: [],
    reviewTasks: [
      {
        id: "review-1",
        concept: "算法与算力",
        reason: "misconception",
        dueAt: new Date(Date.now() + 86400000).toISOString(),
        taskType: "explain_back",
        status: "pending"
      }
    ],
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
  };
}

function makeClassSession(): ClassSessionData {
  return {
    courseId: "future-school",
    lessonId: "ai-three-elements",
    startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    students: [
      { learnerId: "a", questions: ["算力和算法区别？"], weakConcepts: ["算法与算力"], misconceptions: ["把算力理解成算法更聪明"], quizResults: [] },
      { learnerId: "b", questions: ["数据有什么用？"], weakConcepts: ["数据作用"], misconceptions: ["认为数据不重要"], quizResults: [] },
      { learnerId: "c", questions: ["FLOPS 怎么换算？"], weakConcepts: ["算力单位换算"], misconceptions: ["不清楚 PFLOPS 到 GFLOPS"], quizResults: [] },
      { learnerId: "d", questions: ["有没有资源？"], weakConcepts: ["算法与算力"], misconceptions: [], quizResults: [] },
      { learnerId: "e", questions: ["挑战题？"], weakConcepts: [], misconceptions: [], quizResults: [] }
    ]
  };
}

function mockRecommendations(): ResourceRecommendation[] {
  return [
    {
      resource: { id: "r1", title: "AI 三要素入门", platform: "local", url: "demo://ai-three-elements", concepts: ["数据", "算法", "算力"], difficulty: "beginner" },
      matchScore: 0.9,
      matchReason: "覆盖当前页三个核心概念。",
      beforeWatchingQuestion: "数据、算法、算力分别起什么作用？",
      afterWatchingCheckQuestion: "为什么只有算法没有数据和算力不够？"
    },
    {
      resource: { id: "r2", title: "算法与算力辨析", platform: "local", url: "demo://algorithm-compute", concepts: ["算法与算力"], difficulty: "beginner" },
      matchScore: 0.85,
      matchReason: "针对学习记忆中的薄弱点。",
      suggestedSegment: { start: "00:30", end: "03:20", reason: "解释算法和算力区别" },
      beforeWatchingQuestion: "算法决定什么，算力决定什么？",
      afterWatchingCheckQuestion: "用厨房类比解释算法和算力。"
    }
  ];
}

function toSummary(summary: typeof summary): string {
  return [
    "TEST-FUTURE-SCHOOL completed",
    `Created at: ${summary.createdAt}`,
    `Output dir: ${summary.outputDir}`,
    `Cases: ${summary.caseCount}`,
    `Passed cases: ${summary.passedCaseCount}`,
    `Failed cases: ${summary.failedCaseCount}`
  ].join("\n");
}

function toHtml(summary: typeof summary, items: CaseResult[]): string {
  return `<!doctype html><html lang="zh-CN"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>TEST-FUTURE-SCHOOL</title><style>body{font-family:system-ui,"Microsoft YaHei",sans-serif;margin:28px;background:#f7fafc}.case{background:white;border:1px solid #d8e2ec;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin:12px 0}.pass{color:#137a4b}.fail{color:#b42318}</style></head><body><h1>TEST-FUTURE-SCHOOL</h1><p>${summary.passedCaseCount}/${summary.caseCount} passed</p>${items.map((item) => `<section class="case"><h2>${item.id} <span class="${item.passed ? "pass" : "fail"}">${item.passed ? "PASS" : "FAIL"}</span></h2><ul>${item.assertions.map((a) => `<li class="${a.passed ? "pass" : "fail"}">${a.passed ? "PASS" : "FAIL"} ${a.name}</li>`).join("")}</ul></section>`).join("")}</body></html>`;
}

----- FILE END: tests/TEST-FUTURE-SCHOOL/run-test-future-school.ts -----
