[Summary: Project source or test file.]
import { promises as fs } from "node:fs";
import path from "node:path";
import { fileURLToPath } from "node:url";
import {
  MicroQuizGenerator,
  FutureSchoolAgent,
  QuizGenerationUnavailableError,
  QuizGrader,
  QuizQualityChecker,
  ResourceLibraryStore,
  ResourceScoutAgent,
  TeacherInsightAgent,
  type ChatMessage,
  type ClassSessionData,
  type LearnerMemory,
  type LearningContext,
  type LLMClient,
  type MicroQuizQuestion
} from "../../src/agents/learningAssistant/index.ts";

type Assertion = { name: string; passed: boolean; reason?: string };
type CaseResult = { id: string; passed: boolean; assertions: Assertion[] };

const currentFile = fileURLToPath(import.meta.url);
const outDir = path.dirname(currentFile);
const rootDir = path.resolve(outDir, "..", "..");
const results: CaseResult[] = [];

await fs.mkdir(path.join(outDir, "screenshots"), { recursive: true });

const context = aiThreeElementsContext();
const quizGenerator = new MicroQuizGenerator({ llm: qualityQuizLlm() });

let noLlmMessage = "";
try {
  await new MicroQuizGenerator().generate({ learningContext: context, count: 3 });
} catch (error) {
  noLlmMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
}
record("Q01-no-llm-does-not-generate-quiz", [
  assert("throws real llm required", noLlmMessage.includes("真实模型") || noLlmMessage.includes("REAL_LLM")),
  assert("uses unavailable error", noLlmMessage.length > 0)
]);

const quiz = await quizGenerator.generate({ learningContext: context, count: 3 });
record("Q02-configured-llm-generates-quality-quiz", [
  assert("2-3 questions", quiz.questions.length >= 2 && quiz.questions.length <= 3),
  assert("not fixed missing-concept template", quiz.questions.every((item) => !/如果缺少.+本页所讲/.test(item.question))),
  assert("expected answers are concrete", quiz.questions.every((item) => item.expectedAnswer.length > 35 && !/会受到影响|结合本页/.test(item.expectedAnswer))),
  assert("has scoring rubric", quiz.questions.every((item) => item.scoringRubric.fullCredit.length > 0 && item.scoringRubric.commonMistakes.length > 0)),
  assert("has source evidence", quiz.questions.every((item) => item.sourceEvidence.length > 0)),
  assert("quality score threshold", (quiz.quality?.score ?? 0) >= 75, JSON.stringify(quiz.quality))
]);

record("Q03-quiz-questions-are-not-duplicates", [
  assert("question similarity below threshold", maxQuestionSimilarity(quiz.questions) < 0.72)
]);

const computeQuestion = quiz.questions.find((item) => item.concept.includes("算力")) ?? quiz.questions[0];
const grading = new QuizGrader().grade({
  quizQuestion: computeQuestion,
  quizId: quiz.id,
  studentAnswer: "算力就是算法更聪明。",
  learningContext: context
});
record("Q04-grader-detects-misconception", [
  assert("not understood or partial", grading.mastery === "not_understood" || grading.mastery === "partial"),
  assert("detects algorithm compute confusion", /算力|算法|混淆/.test(`${grading.misconception ?? ""} ${grading.feedback}`)),
  assert("feedback is concrete", /算法决定|算力是支撑|计算资源/.test(grading.feedback))
]);

const emptyStore = new ResourceLibraryStore({
  rootDir,
  filePath: path.join(outDir, ".tmp-empty-resource-library", "resources.json")
});
const noSearchAgent = new ResourceScoutAgent({ resourceStore: emptyStore, env: {} });
const noSearch = await noSearchAgent.recommendWithStatus({ learningContext: context, learnerLevel: "beginner" });
record("Q05-no-search-does-not-recommend-fake-resource", [
  assert("no recommendations", noSearch.recommendations.length === 0),
  assert("not configured message", /未配置资源搜索服务|没有找到可靠资源/.test(noSearch.message)),
  assert("no demo resource", !JSON.stringify(noSearch).includes("Demo 资源")),
  assert("no fake time segment", !/\d{2}:\d{2}-\d{2}:\d{2}/.test(JSON.stringify(noSearch)))
]);

const teacherStore = new ResourceLibraryStore({
  rootDir,
  filePath: path.join(outDir, ".tmp-teacher-resource-library", "resources.json")
});
await teacherStore.saveResources([
  {
    id: "teacher-ai-data",
    title: "Machine Learning Crash Course: Data Preparation",
    platform: "school",
    url: "https://developers.google.com/machine-learning/crash-course/data-prep",
    concepts: ["数据", "数据质量", "模型训练"],
    difficulty: "beginner",
    type: "course_page",
    sourceName: "Google Developers",
    credibility: "high",
    verified: true,
    description: "教师导入的公开课程页面，讲解数据准备对模型训练的影响。"
  }
]);
const resourceAgent = new ResourceScoutAgent({ resourceStore: teacherStore, env: {} });
const resourceResult = await resourceAgent.recommendWithStatus({ learningContext: context, learnerLevel: "beginner" });
record("Q06-teacher-library-returns-verifiable-resource", [
  assert("has recommendation", resourceResult.recommendations.length > 0),
  assert("url is real", /^https:\/\//.test(resourceResult.recommendations[0]?.url ?? "")),
  assert("title is real", Boolean(resourceResult.recommendations[0]?.title?.includes("Data"))),
  assert("no invented segment", !resourceResult.recommendations.some((item) => item.suggestedSegment)),
  assert("has learning task fields", Boolean(resourceResult.recommendations[0]?.learningGoal && resourceResult.recommendations[0]?.afterLearningCheckQuestion))
]);

const teacherAgent = new TeacherInsightAgent();
const dashboard = teacherAgent.generateDashboardReport({
  session: mockClassSession(),
  dataSource: "demo_mock_class",
  lessonTitle: "人工智能三要素"
});
record("Q07-teacher-view-labels-data-source", [

]);

record("Q08-teacher-view-has-mini-lesson-and-quiz", [

]);

const teacherMarkdown = teacherAgent.dashboardToMarkdown(dashboard);

  assert("common issues section", teacherMarkdown.includes("本节课共性问题")),

]);

]);

]);

const writebackFromMemory = futureSchoolAgent.suggestWikiWriteback({ learningContext: context, learnerMemory });

});

]);

record("Q15-grading-returns-rubric-match-details", [

  assert("missing rubric list exists", Array.isArray(grading.missingRubricItems)),

]);

);

]);

const summary = {
  testName: "TEST-LEARNING-LOOP-QUALITY",
  createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  caseCount: results.length,
  passedCaseCount: results.filter((item) => item.passed).length,
  failedCaseCount: results.filter((item) => !item.passed).length,
  outputDir: outDir
};

await fs.writeFile(path.join(outDir, "evaluation-results.json"), JSON.stringify({ summary, results }, null, 2), "utf8");
await fs.writeFile(path.join(outDir, "RUN-SUMMARY.txt"), toSummary(summary), "utf8");
await fs.writeFile(path.join(outDir, "evaluation-report.html"), toHtml(summary, results), "utf8");

console.log(`TEST-LEARNING-LOOP-QUALITY completed: ${summary.passedCaseCount}/${summary.caseCount} passed`);
if (summary.failedCaseCount > 0) process.exitCode = 1;

function record(id: string, assertions: Assertion[]) {
  results.push({ id, assertions, passed: assertions.every((item) => item.passed) });
}

function assert(name: string, passed: boolean, reason?: string): Assertion {
  return { name, passed, reason: passed ? undefined : reason ?? "assertion failed" };
}

function aiThreeElementsContext(): LearningContext {
  return {
    material: { id: "demo", type: "pptx", title: "AI 基础", pageCount: 1 },
    currentPage: {
      id: "page-1",
      pageIndex: 1,
      semanticTitle: "人工智能三要素",
      title: "人工智能三要素",
      text: [
        "人工智能三要素",
        "数据是 AI 的知识来源。",
        "算法决定模型如何学习和推理。",
        "算力支撑模型训练和推理。",
        "三者缺一不可，需要相互支撑。"
      ].join("\n"),
      bulletPoints: ["数据", "算法", "算力"]
    },
    teacherScript: {
      source: "platform",
      text: "这一页强调数据、算法和算力不是孤立的。数据提供材料，算法提供方法，算力提供执行能力。"
    },
    learner: {
      id: "demo-learner",
      profile: { level: "beginner", language: "zh" }
    }
  };
}

function qualityQuizLlm(): LLMClient {
  return {
    providerName: "quality-test-llm",
    modelName: "fixture",
    async generate(_messages: ChatMessage[]): Promise<string> {
      return JSON.stringify({
        items: [
          {
            id: "q-data",
            type: "concept_check",
            concept: "数据",
            learningObjective: "理解数据是 AI 的知识来源，决定模型知识边界。",
            question: "这页为什么说数据是 AI 的“知识来源”？请用一句话解释。",
            expectedAnswer: "数据为模型提供学习材料和知识来源，模型能学到什么受到数据内容、规模和质量的限制。",
            scoringRubric: {
              fullCredit: ["指出数据提供学习材料或知识来源", "说明数据会影响模型知识边界或训练效果"],
              partialCredit: ["只说出数据重要，但没有解释知识来源"],
              commonMistakes: ["认为数据质量不重要", "只说数据越多一定越好"]
            },
            hints: ["找当前页中“数据是 AI 的知识来源”这句话。"],
            difficulty: "easy",
            sourceEvidence: "数据是 AI 的知识来源。"
          },
          {
            id: "q-algorithm",
            type: "application",
            concept: "算法",
            learningObjective: "理解算法决定模型如何学习和推理。",
            question: "如果只有数据但没有合适算法，模型学习会卡在哪里？",
            expectedAnswer: "数据只是材料，算法决定模型如何从数据中学习、推理和生成结果；没有合适算法，数据无法被有效利用。",
            scoringRubric: {
              fullCredit: ["说明算法决定如何学习和推理", "能区分数据是材料、算法是方法"],
              partialCredit: ["只说算法重要但没有解释机制"],
              commonMistakes: ["把算法说成算力", "认为有数据就能自动学会"]
            },
            hints: ["用“材料”和“方法”的区别来想。"],
            difficulty: "medium",
            sourceEvidence: "算法决定模型如何学习和推理。"
          },
          {
            id: "q-compute",
            type: "misconception_check",
            concept: "算力",
            learningObjective: "理解算力是支撑训练和推理的计算资源，并区分算力和算法。",
            question: "有同学说“算力就是算法更聪明”。请根据当前页指出这句话哪里不对。",
            expectedAnswer: "这句话把算力和算法混淆了。算法决定模型如何学习和推理，算力是支撑训练和推理的计算资源，决定能不能做得动、做得快。",
            scoringRubric: {
              fullCredit: ["指出混淆了算力和算法", "说明算力是计算资源", "说明算法决定如何学习和推理"],
              partialCredit: ["能说出算力和算法不同", "只解释了算力或算法一方"],
              commonMistakes: ["算力就是算法更聪明", "把算力理解成算法"]
            },
            hints: ["当前页分别写了“算法决定”和“算力支撑”。"],
            difficulty: "medium",
            sourceEvidence: "算力支撑模型训练和推理。"
          }
        ]
      });
    }
  };
}

function mockClassSession(): ClassSessionData {
  return {
    courseId: "future-school",
    lessonId: "ai-three-elements",
    pageId: "page-1",
    startedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    students: [
      { learnerId: "student-a", questions: ["算力和算法有什么区别？"], weakConcepts: ["算法与算力的区别"], misconceptions: ["把算力理解成算法更聪明"], quizResults: [] },
      { learnerId: "student-b", questions: ["为什么只有算法不够？"], weakConcepts: ["算法与算力的区别"], misconceptions: ["混淆算法和算力"], quizResults: [] },
      { learnerId: "student-c", questions: ["数据质量差会怎样？"], weakConcepts: ["数据质量"], misconceptions: ["认为数据越多一定越好"], quizResults: [] }
    ]
  };
}

function learnerMemoryFixture(gradingResult: ReturnType<QuizGrader["grade"]>): LearnerMemory {
  return {
    learnerId: "student-a",
    masteredConcepts: ["数据是 AI 的知识来源"],
    weakConcepts: ["算法与算力的区别"],
    misconceptions: [
      {
        concept: "算法与算力",
        description: "把算力理解成算法更聪明",
        firstSeenAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        lastSeenAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        count: 2,
        examples: ["算力就是算法更聪明。"]
      }
    ],
    quizHistory: [gradingResult],
    reviewTasks: [
      {
        id: "review-compute-algorithm",
        concept: "算法与算力的区别",
        reason: "misconception",
        dueAt: new Date(Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(),
        taskType: "explain_back",
        sourcePageId: "page-1",
        status: "pending"
      }
    ],
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString()
  };
}

function chartReadingContext(): LearningContext {
  return {
    material: { id: "chart-demo", type: "pptx", title: "AI 图表理解", pageCount: 1 },
    currentPage: {
      id: "page-chart",
      pageIndex: 3,
      semanticTitle: "Scaling Law 曲线",
      title: "Scaling Law 曲线",
      text: [
        "Scaling Law 曲线",
        "图中曲线显示：随着数据规模增加，测试损失整体下降。",
        "这支持数据规模会影响模型效果，但不能证明数据越多一定越好。"
      ].join("\n"),
      bulletPoints: ["Scaling Law", "测试损失", "数据规模"]
    },
    teacherScript: {
      source: "platform",
      text: "请学生区分图表能支持的趋势结论，以及不能从图中直接推出的过度结论。"
    },
    learner: {
      id: "demo-learner",
      profile: { level: "intermediate", language: "zh" }
    }
  };
}

function mapMetricContext(): LearningContext {
  return {
    material: { id: "metric-demo", type: "pptx", title: "检测指标", pageCount: 1 },
    currentPage: {
      id: "page-map",
      pageIndex: 7,
      semanticTitle: "mAP / F1 图表",
      title: "mAP / F1 图表",
      text: [
        "mAP_0.5 衡量 IoU=0.5 阈值下的检测平均精度。",
        "mAP_0.5:0.95 用多个 IoU 阈值综合评估检测质量。",
        "F1 综合考虑 precision 和 recall。",
        "当前页同时展示 mAP 和 F1，用于观察检测质量与精确率/召回率的综合变化。"
      ].join("\n"),
      bulletPoints: ["mAP_0.5", "mAP_0.5:0.95", "F1"]
    },
    learner: {
      id: "demo-learner",
      profile: { level: "intermediate", language: "zh" }
    }
  };
}

function templateQuestion(id: string, concept: string): MicroQuizQuestion {
  return {
    id,
    type: "concept_check",
    concept,
    learningObjective: `理解 ${concept} 在当前页中的作用。`,
    question: `如果缺少“${concept}”，本页所讲的系统或方法可能会受到什么影响？`,
    expectedAnswer: "三要素缺一不可，需要结合本页内容说明。",
    scoringRubric: {
      fullCredit: ["说出该概念重要"],
      partialCredit: ["知道该概念出现过"],
      commonMistakes: ["泛泛而谈"]
    },
    hints: ["回到当前页寻找该指标。"],
    difficulty: "medium",
    sourceEvidence: concept
  };
}

function chartReadingLlm(): LLMClient {
  return {
    providerName: "chart-reading-test-llm",
    modelName: "fixture",
    async generate(): Promise<string> {
      return JSON.stringify({
        items: [
          {
            id: "q-chart-trend",
            type: "chart_reading",
            concept: "Scaling Law",
            learningObjective: "能根据当前页曲线区分图表支持的趋势和不能推出的过度结论。",
            question: "图中的 Scaling Law 曲线支持什么结论？它不能支持什么结论？",
            expectedAnswer: "曲线支持随着数据规模增加，测试损失整体下降这一趋势；但它不能证明数据越多一定越好，也不能证明所有任务都会得到同样改善。",
            scoringRubric: {
              fullCredit: ["指出数据规模增加与测试损失下降的趋势", "指出不能推出数据越多一定越好或所有任务都适用"],
              partialCredit: ["只说出曲线显示测试损失下降，但没有说明限制"],
              commonMistakes: ["把趋势说成绝对规律", "声称图表证明所有任务都一定变好"]
            },
            hints: ["先说曲线能直接看到什么，再说不能过度推出什么。"],
            difficulty: "medium",
            sourceEvidence: "随着数据规模增加，测试损失整体下降"
          },
          {
            id: "q-chart-limit",
            type: "misconception_check",
            concept: "数据规模",
            learningObjective: "避免把图表趋势过度解读为无限制的因果结论。",
            question: "为什么不能只根据这张曲线就说“数据越多一定越好”？",
            expectedAnswer: "当前页只给出测试损失整体下降的趋势，不能说明数据质量、任务差异和训练条件都满足；因此不能把趋势过度解读为无条件结论。",
            scoringRubric: {
              fullCredit: ["指出当前页证据只是趋势", "说明还需要考虑数据质量、任务或训练条件限制"],
              partialCredit: ["能说不能过度下结论，但理由不完整"],
              commonMistakes: ["认为曲线已经证明数据越多一定越好"]
            },
            hints: ["想想图表能看到什么，和它没有展示什么。"],
            difficulty: "medium",
            sourceEvidence: "不能证明数据越多一定越好"
          }
        ]
      });
    }
  };
}

function maxQuestionSimilarity(questions: MicroQuizQuestion[]): number {
  let max = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < questions.length; i += 1) {
    for (let j = i + 1; j < questions.length; j += 1) {
      max = Math.max(max, similarity(questions[i].question, questions[j].question));
    }
  }
  return max;
}

function similarity(a: string, b: string): number {
  const left = new Set(a.match(/[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2}|[a-z0-9_]+/gi) ?? []);
  const right = new Set(b.match(/[\u4e00-\u9fa5]{2}|[a-z0-9_]+/gi) ?? []);
  if (!left.size || !right.size) return 0;
  let hits = 0;
  for (const token of left) if (right.has(token)) hits += 1;
  return hits / Math.max(left.size, right.size);
}

function toSummary(summary: typeof summary): string {
  return [
    "TEST-LEARNING-LOOP-QUALITY completed",
    `Created at: ${summary.createdAt}`,
    `Output dir: ${summary.outputDir}`,
    `Cases: ${summary.caseCount}`,
    `Passed cases: ${summary.passedCaseCount}`,
    `Failed cases: ${summary.failedCaseCount}`
  ].join("\n");
}

function toHtml(summary: typeof summary, items: CaseResult[]): string {
  return `<!doctype html><html lang="zh-CN"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><title>TEST-LEARNING-LOOP-QUALITY</title><style>body{font-family:system-ui,"Microsoft YaHei",sans-serif;margin:28px;background:#f7fafc}.case{background:white;border:1px solid #d8e2ec;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin:12px 0}.pass{color:#137a4b}.fail{color:#b42318}</style></head><body><h1>TEST-LEARNING-LOOP-QUALITY</h1><p>${summary.passedCaseCount}/${summary.caseCount} passed</p>${items.map((item) => `<section class="case"><h2>${item.id} <span class="${item.passed ? "pass" : "fail"}">${item.passed ? "PASS" : "FAIL"}</span></h2><ul>${item.assertions.map((a) => `<li class="${a.passed ? "pass" : "fail"}">${a.passed ? "PASS" : "FAIL"} ${a.name}${a.reason ? `: ${a.reason}` : ""}</li>`).join("")}</ul></section>`).join("")}</body></html>`;
}

## Measurement Boundaries

- Dry-run benchmark validates workload and prompt accounting only; it does not measure actual SLO goodput.
- PD simulation metrics are estimated/simulated, not real GPU measurements.
- Real TTFT/ITL/E2E require a streaming endpoint.
- Real vLLM/SGLang cache metrics require a running engine with `/metrics`.
- The code context package redacts API-key-like strings and excludes raw benchmark prompts/answers.


SECTION 7: LIMITATIONS
- No real GPU endpoint in the default environment.
- No real PD disaggregation unless a real disaggregated engine is configured.
- Dry-run has no TTFT/ITL/E2E measurement.
- TokenEstimator is heuristic, not tokenizer-exact.
- Quality proxy is not human evaluation.

SECTION 8: HOW ANOTHER AI SHOULD READ THIS PROJECT
1. Read PROJECT SUMMARY and README.md.
2. Read LearningAssistantAgent.ts for the education-agent pipeline.
3. Read src/agents/learningAssistant/serving/*.ts for trace, token, simulator, and cache logic.
4. Read src/agents/learningAssistant/serving/engines/*.ts for streaming and metrics bridge.
5. Read scripts/run-pd-simulation.ts and scripts/run-engine-benchmark.ts for experiment entry points.
6. Read tests/serving/**/*.test.ts to understand expected behavior and metric truthfulness.
